items.title_en: Claude Opus 4.7
items.title_zh: Claude Opus 4.7 版本发布
items.summary_en: Claude Opus 4.7 advances developer-focused AI capabilities with stronger reasoning, safety features, and tooling for complex agent workflows. It signals Anthropic's push toward more capable, enterprise-ready assistants.
items.summary_zh: Claude Opus 4.7 在推理、安全性和代理工作流工具方面提升，面向开发者的 AI 助手更强大。此次更新体现了 Anthropic 向企业级应用扩展能力的方向。

items.title_en: Google broke its promise to me – now ICE has my data
items.title_zh: 谷歌违背承诺，现在 ICE 已掌握我的数据
items.summary_en: Google's data sharing with ICE, despite promises, highlights how government access can negate user privacy. The case underscores the tension between platform commitments and law enforcement data demands, and the need for stronger privacy controls.
items.summary_zh: 谷歌在承诺后将部分用户数据提供给 ICE，暴露了政府访问如何侵蚀用户隐私的风险。此事凸显平台承诺与执法需求之间的矛盾，强调需要更强的隐私控制与透明度。

items.title_en: Filing the corners off my MacBooks
items.title_zh: 把我的 MacBook 边角削圆
items.summary_en: A playful hardware tweak: the author files the corners of their MacBooks to smooth edges, sharing steps, tools, and cautions about warranty and durability. It doubles as a meditation on DIY customization vs. risk of damaging laptops.
items.summary_zh: 作者动手把 MacBook 的边角削圆，给出具体步骤与所用工具，并讨论此改造对保修与耐用性的影响。全文从极客自我改造的角度，兼具风险评估的思考。

items.title_en: Qwen3.6-35B-A3B: Agentic coding power, now open to all
items.title_zh: Qwen3.6-35B-A3B：代理编码能力，现向所有人开放
items.summary_en: Qwen3.6-35B-A3B releases with agentic coding capabilities, enabling more autonomous tool use and automation. Open availability broadens access for developers to build AI-powered coding assistants.
items.summary_zh: Qwen3.6-35B-A3B 发布，具备代理式编码能力，支持更自主的工具使用与自动化。公开开放让开发者更易打造 AI 驱动的编码助手。

items.title_en: Claude Design
items.title_zh: Claude 设计
items.summary_en: Anthropic unveils Claude Design, a design-focused variant of its AI assistant intended to accelerate creative workflows for designers and product teams. It brings Claude's reasoning to brainstorming, prototyping, and visual generation with collaboration-friendly features and safety safeguards. The release signals AI tools maturing into specialist roles within design and product development.
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 推出 Claude Design，这是一个面向设计任务的 Claude 变体，旨在加速设计师和产品团队的创意工作流程。它将 Claude 的推理能力用于头脑风暴、原型设计和视觉生成，并具备协作功能与安全保护。该发布表明 AI 工具正在向设计和产品开发的专业化角色演进。

items.title_en: Someone bought 30 WordPress plugins and planted a backdoor in all of them
items.title_zh: 有人买下 30 个 WordPress 插件并在全部插件中植入后门
items.summary_en: A security researcher demonstrates the depth of supply-chain risk in plugin ecosystems by buying 30 WordPress plugins and inserting a backdoor into each one. The stunt highlights how third-party extensions can compromise many sites if integrity checks and monitoring are lax.
items.summary_zh: 安全研究者展示了通过购买 30 个 WordPress 插件并在每一个插件中植入后门，能够大范围入侵网站。这暴露了第三方插件的供应链和信任机制漏洞，强调加强插件审计、完整性校验和运行时监控的重要性。

items.title_en: DaVinci Resolve – Photo
items.title_zh: DaVinci Resolve：照片功能
items.summary_en: Blackmagic Design expands DaVinci Resolve with a photo-focused workflow, integrating still-image editing and color tooling into the suite. The update positions Resolve as a unified platform for creators who blend photography and video, potentially reducing tool fragmentation.
items.summary_zh: Blackmagic Design 将 DaVinci Resolve 引入面向照片的工作流，将静态图像编辑和色彩分级工具整合到套件中。此更新使 Resolve 成为摄影与视频制作的统一平台，或将减少跨工具的需求。

items.title_en: Tell HN: Docker pull fails in Spain due to football Cloudflare block
items.title_zh: 西班牙因 Cloudflare 阻断导致 Docker pull 失败
items.summary_en: A Docker pull failure in Spain is linked to Cloudflare blocking football-related requests, illustrating how regional filtering can disrupt developer workflows. It underscores the need for resilient mirrors and alternative routing.
items.summary_zh: 西班牙的 Docker 拉取失败被追踪至 Cloudflare 对足球相关流量的拦截，反映出区域性过滤可能干扰开发工作流。需要更稳健的镜像源与路由策略以缓解。

items.title_en: Backblaze has stopped backing up OneDrive and Dropbox folders and maybe others
items.title_zh: Backblaze 已停止备份 OneDrive、Dropbox 文件夹，可能还包括其他云端存储
items.summary_en: Backblaze stopped backing up OneDrive and Dropbox folders, and possibly other cloud storage. This leaves cloud-native data unprotected by Backblaze and shifts the onus onto users to verify coverage and seek alternative backups.
items.summary_zh: Backblaze 已停止备份 OneDrive 和 Dropbox 文件夹，可能还包括其他云端存储。此举让这些云端数据不再受 Backblaze 的保护，用户需核对覆盖范围并考虑替代备选方案。

items.title_en: Codex for almost everything
items.title_zh: 几乎适用于一切场景的 Codex
items.summary_en: OpenAI expands Codex beyond code generation into a broader set of tasks, positioning it as a universal AI assistant for developers and operators. The move signals growing demand for single-model copilots that can handle coding, data tasks, automation, and workflow integration, reducing context-switching.
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 将 Codex 的应用扩展到广泛任务，将其定位为开发者与运维的通用 AI 助手。此举反映出市场对单一模型兼顾编码、数据处理、自动化与工作流整合的需求日增，减少上下文切换。

items.title_en: Stop Flock
items.title_zh: 停止 Flock
items.summary_en: A manifesto-ish post about stopping Stop Flock, presumably arguing to abandon that tech, and to switch to alternatives due to concerns around maintenance, security, or direction. It highlights why preserving openness matters for developers.
items.summary_zh: 呼吁放弃 Stop Flock 的相关工具/平台，理由可能涉及维护、隐私与安全等问题，并提出转向替代方案的理由。强调对开放性和开发者生态的关注。

items.title_en: A new spam policy for “back button hijacking”
items.title_zh: 防止后退按钮劫持的新策略
items.summary_en: Google updates its spam policy to crack down on back button hijacking, labeling manipulative UX that traps users as spam. The policy provides examples and enforcement expectations, encouraging developers to avoid overlays and deceptive navigation.
items.summary_zh: 谷歌更新了反垃圾邮件政策，打击利用后退按钮劫持的页面，视此类操纵性 UX 为垃圾信息。政策给出示例和执行预期，鼓励开发者避免覆盖层、强制导航等误导性设计。

items.title_en: GitHub Stacked PRs
items.title_zh: GitHub 堆叠 PR
items.summary_en: Stacked PRs bundle several dependent pull requests into a single review flow, letting teams ship large features incrementally. The gh-stack tool provides commands to create, rebase, and track the stack, helping reviewers stay in sync across related changes.
items.summary_zh: 堆叠 PR 将若干相互依赖的 PR 打包到一个评审流程中，便于分阶段交付大型功能。gh-stack 提供创建、变基和跟踪等命令，使评审人能够在相关改动之间保持同步。

items.title_en: I run multiple $10K MRR companies on a $20/month tech stack
items.title_zh: 用20美元/月的技术栈运营多家月订阅收入达一万美元的公司
items.summary_en: Running several SaaS-like businesses on a $20/month stack is feasible with strong automation and lean operations. The post outlines strategies to maintain roughly $10K MRR per product at tiny ongoing costs, highlighting how a low-cost, automated stack can scale.
items.summary_zh: 在极低成本和高度自动化的条件下，仍然能经营多家以订阅为核心的产品并实现可观的月经常性收入。作者分享了将每个项目的月耗控在约20美元、个别产品实现约1万美元MRR的做法，挑战了对高成本技术栈的普遍认知。

items.title_en: Migrating from DigitalOcean to Hetzner
items.title_zh: 从 DigitalOcean 迁移到 Hetzner：零停机与成本下降
items.summary_en: A hands-on migration showing how a production workload moved from DigitalOcean to Hetzner with zero downtime and significant cost savings. The piece shares practical steps, from plan and backups to DNS cutover and testing, illustrating how to optimize cloud spend without sacrificing availability.
items.summary_zh: 实践性案例展示了如何将生产 workloads 从 DigitalOcean 迁移到 Hetzner，确保零停机并显著降低成本。文章分享从计划、备份到 DNS 切换与测试的要点，说明在不牺牲可用性的前提下实现云成本优化。

items.title_en: All elementary functions from a single binary operator
items.title_zh: 用单一二元运算生成所有初等函数
items.summary_en: Proves that a single binary operator can generate all elementary functions, revealing a surprisingly small algebraic basis for calculus. The result has implications for symbolic computation, functional programming, and universal function representations.
items.summary_zh: 研究表明，通过一个二元运算即可构造所有初等函数，揭示了微积分的极简代数基础。这一发现可能影响符号计算、函数式编程以及统一表示函数的方法。

items.title_en: Tell HN: Fiverr left customer files public and searchable
items.title_zh: Tell HN：Fiverr 将客户文件公开且可检索
items.summary_en: A reported misconfiguration left customer project files publicly accessible and searchable, exposing potentially sensitive data and trade secrets. The incident underscores the risk of data leakage in freelancing marketplaces and the importance of rapid remediation and audit.
items.summary_zh: 有报道称 Fiverr 的配置错误使客户文件公开且可被检索，暴露潜在的敏感数据与商业机密。事件凸显自由职业市场的数据泄露风险，以及需要快速修复与审计的必要性。

items.title_en: IPv6 traffic crosses the 50% mark
items.title_zh: IPv6 流量突破 50%
items.summary_en: Global IPv6 traffic has crossed the 50% threshold, signaling widespread adoption across networks and providers. The milestone reduces pressure on IPv4, but many operators still wrestle with dual-stack management and security considerations.
items.summary_zh: 全球 IPv6 流量已突破 50% 的门槛，表明网络和运营商对 IPv6 的采用已广泛普及。这个里程碑减少了对 IPv4 的依赖，但运营商在双栈管理与安全性方面仍面临挑战。

items.title_en: Ban the sale of precise geolocation
items.title_zh: 是时候禁止精确地理位置数据的买卖
items.summary_en: The piece argues that precise geolocation data enables pervasive surveillance and targeted manipulation; advocates policy to ban its sale and transfer. It calls for tighter data-broker accountability, with attention to enforcement and alternatives for legitimate use cases like emergency services.
items.summary_zh: 该文章认为精确地理位置信息的买卖会带来广泛的监控与定向影响，主张禁止此类交易并提高数据中介的问责。讨论执法难点与对紧急服务等正当用途的平衡，强调需要更严格的监管框架。

items.title_en: Pro Max 5x quota exhausted in 1.5 hours despite moderate usage
items.title_zh: Pro Max 5x 配额在 1.5 小时内耗尽，使用量中等
items.summary_en: Quotas can throttle heavy workloads far quicker than one might expect, even with moderate activity. This case underscores the importance of understanding rate limits and having fallback or multi-account strategies for critical tasks.
items.summary_zh: 在中等使用量下，配额在1.5小时内就被耗尽，暴露了按用户设定的限额在持续工作中的约束。此事提醒开发者在规划工作流时要考虑配额上限、突发流量以及备选方案。

items.title_en: Isaac Asimov: The Last Question (1956)
items.title_zh: 艾萨克·阿西莫夫：《最后的问题》（1956）
items.summary_en: Asimov’s 1956 short story follows humanity's recurring question about reversing entropy, answered by increasingly capable computer systems across epochs. The narrative foreshadows core AI issues—scaling capabilities, interpretability, and the cost of pursuing unbounded optimization. It remains a touchstone for long-term thinking about technology's reach and risks.
items.summary_zh: 1956 年，阿西莫夫的短篇讲述人类不断提出逆转熵的问题，由日渐强大的计算机系统在不同历史阶段给出答案。故事预示了 AI 扩展能力、可解释性以及追求无界优化的代价等核心议题。至今，它仍是关于技术影响及长期风险思考的重要参照。

items.title_en: The future of everything is lies, I guess: Where do we go from here?
items.title_zh: 未来一切都是谎言？我们该往何处走？
items.summary_en: Aphyr argues that grand narratives around 'the future of everything' are dangerous and that we need pragmatic, testable approaches to technology. He advocates clearer accountability, honest risk assessment, and building robust systems rather than chasing sensational predictions.
items.summary_zh: 作者认为关于‘一切的未来’的宏大叙事往往误导，需要以可验证、务实的技术路径取代。倡导明确的问责、真实的风险评估，以及构建鲁棒系统，而非追捧耸人听闻的预言。

items.title_en: DIY Soft Drinks
items.title_zh: 自制软饮
items.summary_en: A guide to making your own carbonated drinks, including syrups, carbonation methods, and flavoring ideas, with tips on cost, customization, and scaling. It shows how small-batch experimentation can rival commercial beverages.
items.summary_zh: 一份自制软饮指南，涵盖糖浆、碳化方法与口味搭配，强调成本、定制化与小批量制作的可行性。通过动手尝试，可以在家实现与商业饮料相近的口感与乐趣。

items.title_en: Claude Code Routines
items.title_zh: Claude 的代码例程
items.summary_en: Claude has published a collection of code routines—modular templates and functions—for building AI-assisted software. These routines aim to accelerate common programming tasks and demonstrate practical patterns for applying language models in real-world coding workflows.
items.summary_zh: Claude 发布了一系列代码例程——模块化模板与函数，用于构建 AI 助力的软件。这些例程旨在加速常见编程任务，展示将大语言模型应用于实际编码工作流的实用模式。

items.title_en: Rare concert recordings are landing on the Internet Archive
items.title_zh: 罕见演唱会录音正登陆互联网档案馆
items.summary_en: Thousands of rare concert recordings are landing on the Internet Archive, expanding its treasure trove of live performances. The influx broadens access for fans and researchers, but raises questions about rights, licensing, and long-term preservation.
items.summary_zh: 数千份罕见的演唱会录音正加入互联网档案馆，丰富了其现场演出藏品。增加的内容让粉丝和研究者获取更加广泛，但也引发关于版权、许可与长期保存的讨论。

items.title_en: Measuring Claude 4.7's tokenizer costs
items.title_zh: 测量 Claude 4.7 的分词成本
items.summary_en: A researcher quantifies Claude 4.7's tokenizer costs, breaking down per-token economics and per-request implications. The analysis shows how tokenization shapes pricing, throughput, and model efficiency in real deployments. Takeaway: tokenization matters as much as model performance when budgeting AI workloads.
items.summary_zh: 对 Claude 4.7 的分词成本进行量化分析，分解每个 token 的成本与每次请求的经济影响，揭示分词对定价、吞吐量和实际部署效率的作用。结论显示，在 AI 工作负载预算中，分词成本与模型性能同等重要。

items.title_en: The buns in McDonald's Japan's burger photos are all slightly askew
items.title_zh: 日本麥當勞漢堡照片中的麵包略微歪斜
items.summary_en: A close look at McDonald's Japan burger photos reveals buns that are consistently slightly askew. The misalignment may be a photography quirk or a production reality, but it sparks discussion about brand presentation versus the actual product. In an era of highly scrutinized visuals, tiny imperfections can become talking points about authenticity in marketing.
items.summary_zh: 日本麥當勞的漢堡照片顯示麵包頂部與餡料間常出現輕微不對稱。這種偏差可能是拍攝風格或製作過程造成，但卻引發對品牌呈現與實物之間差異的討論。在社群媒體高度放大的情境中，這種細微瑕疵也會成為關於真實感的話題。

items.title_en: I wrote to Flock's privacy contact to opt out of their domestic spying program
items.title_zh: 我给 Flock 的隐私联系邮箱写信，请求退出他们的国内监控计划
items.summary_en: An opt-out request to Flock's privacy contact highlights ongoing concerns about how browsers collect data and potential domestic data-sharing arrangements. The issue underscores the need for transparent privacy controls and auditable telemetry for users who want to protect their data.
items.summary_zh: 向 Flock 的隐私联系渠道提出退出请求，凸显关于浏览器数据收集与潜在国内数据共享的持续担忧。此事强调需要透明的隐私控制与可审计的遥测数据，帮助用户保护自己的信息。

items.title_en: Seven countries now generate nearly all their electricity from renewables (2024)
items.title_zh: 七个国家2024年几乎用可再生能源发电全部电力
items.summary_en: Across several nations, electricity generation is approaching 100% renewables, driven primarily by hydro, wind, and solar plus supportive policy frameworks. While intermittency remains a challenge, these cases show that with grid investments and capacity planning, a transition to low-carbon electricity is increasingly feasible at national scales.
items.summary_zh: 多国的电力生产正在接近100%来自可再生能源，主要靠水电、风电和太阳能及配套政策。尽管间歇性仍是挑战，但这些案例表明通过电网投资和容量规划，国家层面的低碳发电转型正变得更加可行。

items.title_en: Bring Back Idiomatic Design (2023)
items.title_zh: 回归地道设计
items.summary_en: The piece argues for designing APIs and UIs that follow the host language's idioms rather than importing external design paradigms. It reinforces how idiomatic design improves readability and safety.
items.summary_zh: 文章主张在软件设计中遵循目标语言的习惯用法，而非照搬外部风格。强调地道设计提升可读性、安全性和开发者体验。

items.title_en: The local LLM ecosystem doesn’t need Ollama
items.title_zh: 本地大模型生态不需要 Ollama
items.summary_en: Ollama is not essential for local LLM workflows; the piece argues that the local ecosystem can be served by simpler tooling or native inference stacks, reducing friction and maintenance. It weighs trade-offs in updates, platform compatibility, and ecosystem maturity.
items.summary_zh: 本文认为本地大语言模型生态并不需要 Ollama；可以通过更简单的工具或原生推理栈完成同样任务，降低运维成本。文章比较了更新、平台兼容性和生态成熟度等权衡，指出 Ollama 可能并非必需。

items.title_en: Vercel April 2026 security incident
items.title_zh: Vercel 2026 年 4 月安全事件披露
items.summary_en: Vercel disclosed a security incident from April 2026, detailing what happened, the affected services, and the steps they took to contain and remediate. The disclosure underscores how even modern cloud platforms can face complex attacks, stressing the importance of monitoring, rapid incident response, and proactive customer credential hygiene.
items.summary_zh: Vercel 披露了 2026 年 4 月的安全事件，说明了事件经过、受影响的服务以及应对和修复措施。这次披露凸显了即便是现代云平台也会遭遇复杂攻击，强调监控、快速响应和客户凭据安全的重要性。

items.title_en: Live Nation illegally monopolized ticketing market, jury finds
items.title_zh: 陪审团认定 Live Nation 垄断票务市场
items.summary_en: Jury finds Live Nation illegally monopolized the ticketing market, signaling potential antitrust pressure on major events platforms.
items.summary_zh: 陪审团裁定 Live Nation 非法垄断票务市场，显示对大型票务平台的反垄断压力在上升。

items.title_en: Anonymous request-token comparisons from Opus 4.6 and Opus 4.7
items.title_zh: Opus 4.6 与 Opus 4.7 的匿名请求令牌比较
items.summary_en: A public leaderboard contrasts how many tokens are consumed by anonymous requests across Opus 4.6 and Opus 4.7. The results illustrate how a version bump can change token efficiency, with practical implications for cost-conscious API users and performance tuning.
items.summary_zh: 公开的排行榜对比 Opus 4.6 与 4.7 在匿名请求中消耗的令牌数量，揭示版本迭代对 token 效率的影响。对希望控制成本和优化性能的开发者来说，这类比较提供了有价值的基准。

items.title_en: Exploiting the most prominent AI agent benchmarks
items.title_zh: 利用最显著的 AI 代理基准测试
items.summary_en: Berkeley piece critiques how prominent AI benchmarks are exploited or gamed, questioning reliability of current benchmarks for real-world agent evaluation. It argues for more robust, trustworthy benchmarks to guide research and product decisions.
items.summary_zh: Berkeley 的文章质疑当前最显著的 AI 代理基准的健壮性，指出评测结果可能被操纵或不充分反映现实场景。它呼吁建立更可信的基准，以正确引导研究方向和产品决策。

items.title_en: God sleeps in the minerals
items.title_zh: 神眠于矿物之中
items.summary_en: Minerals carry Earth's history and future potential for technology and energy, and the piece reflects on their quiet power shaping civilization.
items.summary_zh: 矿物承载着地球的历史与未来技术、能源潜力，文章反思它们在安静中塑造文明的力量。

items.title_en: Archive of BYTE magazine, starting with issue #1 in 1975
items.title_zh: Byte 杂志档案，起始于1975年第1期
items.summary_en: Archive of Byte magazine from 1975 onward provides a window into early microcomputer culture. It collects hardware hacks, software reviews, and stories that shaped early personal computing. For historians and tinkerers, it's a valuable snapshot of the era's ideas and constraints.
items.summary_zh: Byte 杂志档案为人们打开了1970年代末至1980年代初计算机文化的窗口。它汇集了硬件 hacks、软件评测以及塑造早期个人计算的故事。对于历史研究者和动手爱好者来说，这是了解那个时代思想与局限性的宝贵快照。

items.title_en: jj – the CLI for Jujutsu
items.title_zh: jj：Jujutsu 的命令行界面
items.summary_en: jj is a new command-line interface for Jujutsu, aiming to simplify interaction with the Jujutsu framework. It provides a convenient, scriptable way to perform core tasks and experiments, reflecting a broader trend toward CLI-first tooling in niche systems.
items.summary_zh: jj 是一个新的 Jujutsu 命令行界面，旨在简化与 Jujutsu 框架的交互。它提供一个便捷、可脚本化的方式来执行核心任务和实验，体现了在小众系统中向 CLI 优先工具的总体趋势。

items.title_en: Cybersecurity looks like proof of work now
items.title_zh: 網路安全如今看起來像工作量證明
items.summary_en: Cybersecurity is increasingly framed as a persistent, resource-intensive effort that mirrors proof-of-work dynamics. Defenders must continually invest to detect, deter, and recover from breaches, creating an ongoing arms race with threat actors. This perspective helps explain why security budgets tend to expand with rising threat capabilities.
items.summary_zh: 網路防護已成為一場持續且成本高昂的博弈，仿佛工作量證明在起作用。防禦方需要不斷投入資源來偵測、阻擊與修復破口，與威脅方的能力共同推動成本上升。以此觀點看待企業安全預算的成長具有說服力。

items.title_en: Google removes "Doki Doki Literature Club" from Google Play
items.title_zh: Google 将《Doki Doki Literature Club》从 Google Play 下架
items.summary_en: Google removed the game from Play Store, triggering questions about platform moderation. The move highlights how policy decisions affect indie games' visibility and monetization. It also sparks debate over criteria, consistency, and censorship on major app stores.
items.summary_zh: 谷歌已将该游戏从应用商店下架，引发关于平台审核与独立游戏曝光之间平衡的讨论。此举凸显了政策决策对独立开发者的可见度与盈利的影响，并引发关于标准、执行一致性以及平台审查尺度的辩论。

items.title_en: Why Japan has such good railways
items.title_zh: 日本铁路为何如此出色
items.summary_en: Explores factors behind Japan's top-tier rail network: meticulous maintenance, on-time performance, dense urban planning, and integrated operations. The piece shows how culture, funding, and technology converge to deliver reliable service.
items.summary_zh: 本文分析日本铁路的四大支撑：精细维护、准点运营、密集的城市规划以及一体化运营。作者指出文化、资金投入与技术协同共同铸就了高水平的铁路服务。

items.title_en: Show HN: boringBar – a taskbar-style dock replacement for macOS
items.title_zh: Show HN：boringBar——macOS 的任务栏风格 Dock 替代
items.summary_en: boringBar is a macOS replacement for the Dock with a taskbar-style interface. It emphasizes persistent pinned apps, quick-launch, and consistent shortcuts across spaces, offering an alternative UX to Apple’s native Dock. If it gains traction, it signals demand for more modular, multitasking-oriented macOS UI.
items.summary_zh: boringBar 是一个为 macOS 设计的 Dock 替代，采用类似任务栏的界面，便于固定应用、快速启动并在各工作区保持一致。它为多任务工作提供了新的交互方式，若受欢迎，可能反映出对更模块化、以多任务为导向的 macOS UI 的需求。

items.title_en: Anthropic downgraded cache TTL on March 6th
items.title_zh: Anthropic 在3月6日下调 Claude 的缓存 TTL
items.summary_en: Anthropic reduced Claude's cache TTL on March 6, affecting how fresh responses are served to clients. The change increases cache churn, potentially improving freshness at the cost of latency and API throughput. It signals ongoing tuning of balance between speed, cost, and accuracy.
items.summary_zh: 3月6日，Anthropic 下调了 Claude 的缓存 TTL，导致返回结果的时效性和新鲜度受到影响。更高的缓存替换率提升了新鲜度，但可能增加延迟与成本，反映出在速度、成本与准确性之间的持续调参。

items.title_en: Most people can't juggle one ball
items.title_zh: 大多数人都难以同时完成一个任务
items.summary_en: The piece argues cognitive limits cap how many things we can track or manage; multitasking often reduces performance even with simple tasks. This finding has implications for UX and product design, reminding designers not to promise effortless multitasking.
items.summary_zh: 作者主张人类在同时处理多项任务时存在认知极限，哪怕是处理一个简单任务也会有困难。这一发现对用户体验和产品设计有启示：避免把多任务承诺得过于美好，需更真实地考虑人类注意力与工作记忆的边界。

items.title_en: Want to write a compiler? Just read these two papers (2008)
items.title_zh: 想写编译器吗？只要读这两篇论文（2008）
items.summary_en: Reading them provides a practical, compact blueprint for building a compiler and avoiding common pitfalls.
items.summary_zh: 文章推荐两篇2008年的关键论文，浓缩了编译器实现的核心要点，读者可以获得写编译器的实用路线图与要点。

items.title_en: Darkbloom – Private inference on idle Macs
items.title_zh: Darkbloom：在闲置 Mac 上进行私有推断
items.summary_en: Darkbloom enables private ML inference to run on idle Macs, turning unused compute into on-device AI. It emphasizes local data processing and privacy by avoiding cloud inference, illustrating a path for consumer hardware to support private AI workloads. If broadly adopted, it could shift how individuals contribute to AI without exposing data.
items.summary_zh: Darkbloom 让闲置的 Mac 上也能运行私有化的机器学习推断，将空闲计算力转化为本地 AI 处理，避免将数据送往云端。此类方案强调本地数据处理与隐私，展示了利用日常硬件承载私有 AI 的可能路径。若普及，或改变个人对 AI 的参与方式，降低外部数据暴露风险。

items.title_en: Show HN: Smol machines – subsecond coldstart, portable virtual machines
items.title_zh: Show HN：Smol 机器——亚秒冷启动、便携式虚拟机
items.summary_en: Smol machines promise subsecond cold starts with portable virtual machines, enabling lightweight, on-the-go VM workloads. The project, implemented in smolvm and open source, emphasizes a tiny footprint and rapid startup for edge and development tasks.
items.summary_zh: Smol 机器承诺实现亚秒级冷启动的便携式虚拟机，适合轻量级、便携式的 VM 工作负载。该项目在 smolvm 中实现并开源，强调极小 footprint 与快速启动，适用于边缘计算和开发场景。

items.title_en: The dangers of California's legislation to censor 3D printing
items.title_zh: 加州旨在审查3D打印的立法风险
items.summary_en: California's proposed legislation would impose broad controls on 3D printing designs, potentially forcing platforms to police printable files. Critics warn the measure risks chilling innovation and free expression while creating compliance burdens across makers and vendors.
items.summary_zh: 加州拟议的立法可能对3D打印设计实施广泛监管，要求平台对可打印的设计进行审查。评论认为此举可能抑制创新与言论自由，同时增加制造商与开发者的合规负担。

items.title_en: The peril of laziness lost
items.title_zh: 失去懒惰的危机
items.summary_en: Removing laziness can carry hidden risks. The piece argues that disciplined efficiency can backfire in surprising ways, potentially stifling creativity and resilience.
items.summary_zh: 文章指出失去懒惰所带来的风险，强调在克制与纪律之外可能出现的隐性成本。

items.title_en: College instructor turns to typewriters to curb AI-written work
items.title_zh: 大学讲师用打字机遏制 AI 写作
items.summary_en: A college instructor adopts typewriters to counter AI-written submissions and to teach craft, effort, and handwriting. The move sparks broader questions about assessment, originality, and skills development in an era of automated writing.
items.summary_zh: 一位大学讲师转用打字机来抑制 AI 写作的泛滥，并借此重申手写与过程性技能的重要性。此举引发关于评估、原创性及技能培养在 AI 时代的广泛讨论。

items.title_en: Nothing Ever Happens: Polymarket bot that always buys No on non-sports markets
items.title_zh: 没有什么事会发生：一个在非体育市场总是买‘否’的 Polymarket 机器人
items.summary_en: A Polymarket bot consistently places 'No' bets on non-sports markets, revealing a recurring pattern in market dynamics that automated strategies can exploit. This raises questions about prediction-market design and how such bots can skew odds or drain liquidity.
items.summary_zh: 一个 Polymarket 机器人在非体育市场持续以‘否’下注，暴露了市场机制中的漏洞和自动化策略的潜在影响。此现象引发对预测市场设计、赔率偏差以及流动性消耗的讨论。

items.title_en: Servo is now available on crates.io
items.title_zh: Servo 现已在 crates.io 上架
items.summary_en: Servo, the Rust-based browser engine, is now published as a crates.io crate. This makes it easier for developers to depend on Servo directly from their Rust projects and experiment with its components like WebRender. The release could accelerate integration efforts and broader experimentation within the Rust ecosystem.
items.summary_zh: Rust 生态中的浏览器引擎 Servo 现已以 crates.io 包形式发布。开发者可以直接在 Rust 项目中依赖 Servo，并尝试其组件如 WebRender。此举可能加速在 Rust 生态内对渲染模块的集成和实验。

items.title_en: US appeals court declares 158-year-old home distilling ban unconstitutional
items.title_zh: 158年历史的家庭蒸馏禁令被判违宪
items.summary_en: An appeals court struck down a long-standing home distilling ban as unconstitutional, signaling a notable shift in how aging alcohol regulations are interpreted. The decision could influence hobbyist distillers and spark broader debate about regulatory modernization in the U.S.
items.summary_zh: 联邦上诉法院裁定一项历时158年的家庭蒸馏禁令违宪，标志着对过时酒精法规的重大挑战。此判决可能影响爱好者自行酿酒的合规性，并推动监管现代化的讨论。

items.title_en: Qwen3.6-35B-A3B on my laptop drew me a better pelican than Claude Opus 4.7
items.title_zh: 在笔记本上用 Qwen3.6-35B-A3B 画出比 Claude Opus 4.7 更好的鹈鹕
items.summary_en: A personal test comparing local LLMs shows Qwen3.6-35B-A3B on a laptop reportedly produces a better pelican image than Claude Opus 4.7. It suggests capable performance from local models without heavy cloud compute, hinting at shifting workloads to open hardware.
items.summary_zh: 作者在本地笔记本上使用 Qwen3.6-35B-A3B 生成的鹈鹕图像胜过 Claude Opus 4.7，显示本地高效模型也能交付出色结果。此类对比凸显将部分 AI 工作负载转移到本地硬件的可行性与成本优势。

items.title_en: Cloudflare Email Service
items.title_zh: Cloudflare 推出面向代理的邮件服务
items.summary_en: Cloudflare launches Email for Agents, a scalable backend designed for AI agents to send and receive mail with edge-optimized reliability. It highlights a trend of embedding email capabilities into AI workflows.
items.summary_zh: Cloudflare 推出面向代理的电子邮件服务，提供可在边缘基础设施上高效发送接收邮件的后端，方便 AI 助手执行业务通信。

items.title_en: State of Kdenlive
items.title_zh: Kdenlive现状更新
items.summary_en: The update outlines the current state of the Kdenlive project, including recent milestones and near-term plans. It highlights how the team is balancing stability with new features, and what this means for users relying on open-source video editing.
items.summary_zh: 该更新概述 Kdenlive 项目的当前状态、近期里程碑与未来计划，强调团队在稳定性和新功能之间的权衡。对于依赖开源视频编辑工具的用户而言，这关系到未来的可用性和生态活力。

items.title_en: All 12 moonwalkers had "lunar hay fever" from dust smelling like gunpowder (2018)
items.title_zh: 所有12名登月宇航员因月尘散发的火药味而出现类似花粉热的症状
items.summary_en: ESA notes that all 12 Apollo astronauts reported hay-fever-like symptoms linked to lunar dust, which carries a gunpowder-like odor. The dust is chemically reactive and potentially toxic, posing health risks for future Moon missions and influencing habitat and suit design. Understanding its toxicity informs protective strategies for crews and equipment.
items.summary_zh: 欧洲航天局报告称，所有12名阿波罗任务宇航员都出现了与月尘相关的打喷嚏样症状，月尘散发着类似火药的气味。月尘具有化学反应性和潜在毒性，对未来月球任务的健康与安全构成风险，并影响基地、宇航服的设计。了解其毒性有助于制定对乘员和设备的防护策略。

items.title_en: Make tmux pretty and usable (2024)
items.title_zh: 让 tmux 更美观、更易用
items.summary_en: A practical guide to customizing tmux, covering themes, status bars, fonts, and key bindings to improve aesthetics and workflow. It shares concrete configurations and tips for a more pleasant, productive terminal multiplexer experience.
items.summary_zh: 这篇指南给出实用的 tmux 自定义方法，涵盖主题、状态栏、字体和快捷键等，提升外观与工作流。通过具体的配置建议，帮助开发者把终端多路复用器变得更好用。

items.title_en: Spain to expand internet blocks to tennis, golf, movies broadcasting times
items.title_zh: 西班牙拟将互联网封锁扩展至网球、高尔夫等赛事及电影播出时段
items.summary_en: Spain plans to extend internet blocks to the broadcasting windows of tennis, golf, and movies. The move targets piracy enforcement and rights holders, potentially altering access controls and user experience. It underscores the ongoing tension between copyright enforcement and online freedom.
items.summary_zh: 西班牙计划把互联网封锁扩展到网球、高尔夫及电影的播出时段，旨在打击盗版并保护版权方利益。此举可能改变用户的内容访问方式，并引发关于自由与执法边界的讨论。

items.title_en: Game devs explain the tricks involved with letting you pause a game
items.title_zh: 游戏开发者揭秘暂停游戏背后的技术技巧
items.summary_en: Pausing a game is more than freezing the screen. It requires carefully suspending the game loop, physics, and timers while keeping audio and other subsystems coherent. In multiplayer and lockstep scenarios, pausing becomes far from trivial, so developers use tricks like time scaling, separate render-only states, or input buffering to ensure a consistent experience.
items.summary_zh: 暂停游戏不仅仅是将画面停下。需要精确地暂停游戏循环、物理仿真和计时器，同时保持音频等子系统的连贯。在多人或锁步场景下，暂停远非易事，开发者会使用时间缩放、仅渲染状态分离或输入缓冲等技巧来保证体验的一致性。

items.title_en: Apple's accidental moat: How the "AI Loser" may end up winning
items.title_zh: 苹果的意外护城河：AI 落后者也许会赢
items.summary_en: Apple's cautious stance on AI could become a durable moat, built on privacy, on-device AI, and a tightly integrated ecosystem. As competitors chase scale, Apple's trust advantage and user experience may prove sturdier over the long term.
items.summary_zh: 苹果对 AI 热潮的谨慎态度可能成为长期护城河，源自隐私保护、设备端 AI 与紧密的生态系统。随着竞争对手追逐规模，苹果在信任与用户体验方面的优势或在长期内更为稳固。

items.title_en: Backpacks got worse on purpose
items.title_zh: 背包设计被故意设计得更差
items.summary_en: The author contends that some backpacks have been designed to degrade in quality or functionality on purpose to spur purchases or keep prices higher. The article argues features that make them less durable or harder to repair are part of a deliberate strategy.
items.summary_zh: 作者认为某些背包的设计被故意降级，以刺激购买或提升利润。文章指出使其更不耐用、维修更困难的特征是有意为之的策略。

items.title_en: Anna's Archive loses $322M Spotify piracy case without a fight
items.title_zh: Anna's Archive 在 Spotify 盗版案中败诉，未作抗辩
items.summary_en: Anna's Archive forfeited a $322M Spotify piracy case, choosing not to mount a legal defense. The outcome signals the high stakes for platforms hosting infringing content and highlights challenges around moderation and takedown workflows.
items.summary_zh: Anna's Archive 因对 Spotify 盗版案缺乏抗辩而败诉，涉案金额高达 3.22 亿美元。结果凸显托管侵权内容的高风险，以及取证与下架流程的挑战。

items.title_en: Michael Rabin has died
items.title_zh: 迈克尔·O·拉宾逝世
items.summary_en: Obituary of Michael O. Rabin, highlighting his foundational contributions to computer science, including automata theory and cryptographic ideas. His work on algorithms and probabilistic methods helped shape modern CS.
items.summary_zh: 迈克尔·O.拉宾逝世，回顾他在计算机科学领域的奠基性贡献，包括自动机理论和相关密码学思想，对现代计算机科学影响深远。

items.title_en: Good sleep, good learning, good life (2012)
items.title_zh: 良好睡眠、良好学习、良好生活（2012）
items.summary_en: A 2012 article links sleep quality to memory consolidation and learning efficiency, arguing that good sleep supports better recall and problem-solving. It also offers practical tips on sleep duration, timing, and avoiding cognitive fatigue.
items.summary_zh: 本文把睡眠质量与记忆巩固、学习效率联系起来，认为充足睡眠能提升记忆与问题解决能力。还给出睡眠时长、作息节律以及避免认知疲劳的实用建议。

items.title_en: NIST scientists create 'any wavelength' lasers
items.title_zh: 任意颜色任你选：NIST科学家研制“任意波长”激光器
items.summary_en: NIST researchers demonstrate on-chip tunable lasers capable of emitting a wide range of wavelengths from a single device, enabling compact, multi-wavelength light sources. This could reduce system size and cost for spectroscopy, sensing, and communications, accelerating advances in integrated photonics.
items.summary_zh: NIST 展示了能在芯片上实现多波长输出的可调激光器，单一器件即可覆盖多条波长，适合光谱、传感和通信等领域。此类微型电路有望降低系统体积与成本，推动集成光子技术的发展。

items.title_en: The economics of software teams: Why most engineering orgs are flying blind
items.title_zh: 软件团队的经济学：为何多数工程组织在盲目运作
items.summary_en: Most engineering organizations lack visibility into the true cost of software delivery, often optimizing for velocity rather than value. The piece argues that without product-aligned incentives and cost-aware metrics, teams accumulate technical debt and misallocate resources. It offers practical levers like measuring feature economics, improving cross-functional collaboration, and building dashboards that surface cycle time, cost per feature, and delivered impact.
items.summary_zh: 工程组织往往对软件交付的真实成本缺乏清晰度，常以追求速度为目标而忽视价值。若缺乏以产品为导向的激励与成本感知的指标，团队容易积累技术债务、资源错配。文中提出通过衡量功能经济学、提高跨职能协作，以及建立能反映交付成本、周期时间和实际影响的看板等来纠偏。

items.title_en: Android now stops you sharing your location in photos
items.title_zh: Android 现在阻止你在照片中分享位置信息
items.summary_en: Android now strips location data from photos before sharing, helping protect user privacy when posting to social apps. The change reduces inadvertent location leaks and sets a baseline for privacy controls across mobile platforms, though users can still re-enable when needed.
items.summary_zh: Android 新功能在分享照片前移除位置信息元数据，帮助用户避免地理位置信息泄露。该改动提升隐私保护，但仍允许需要时开启位置标记的选项。

items.title_en: €54k spike in 13h from unrestricted Firebase browser key accessing Gemini APIs
items.title_zh: 13小时内因未受限的 Firebase 浏览器密钥访问 Gemini API 导致€54k 的账单激增
items.summary_en: An unrestricted Firebase browser key caused a €54k Gemini API bill in about 13 hours, illustrating the cost risk of lax credentials. It underscores the need for strict key restrictions, monitoring, and secure config in cloud-integrated AI workloads.
items.summary_zh: 未受限的 Firebase 浏览器密钥在约13小时内触发对 Gemini API 的€54,000 账单，暴露了凭证管理的成本风险。强调在云端集成 AI 工作负载中对密钥限制、监控和安全配置的必要性。

items.title_en: The electromechanical angle computer inside the B-52 bomber's star tracker
items.title_zh: B-52 轰炸机星跟踪器内的机电角度计算机
items.summary_en: A detailed look at the electromechanical angle computer housed inside the B-52's star tracker. It converts star-field data into aircraft attitude angles with gears and relays, a relic of pre-digital avionics ingenuity. The design shows how engineers built reliable navigation hardware under wartime constraints and hints at the evolution of embedded computing.
items.summary_zh: 通过解读B-52轰炸机星跟踪器内的机电角度计算机，这篇文章展示了在没有数字处理器时，如何靠齿轮、继电器等部件实现航向姿态计算。它揭示了早期航电系统在可靠性、响应时效与维护方面的权衡，以及嵌入式计算发展的一个有趣里程碑。

items.title_en: Lean proved this program correct; then I found a bug
items.title_zh: Lean 证明了该程序正确；随后我发现了一个漏洞
items.summary_en: Lean proved the program correct, but a subsequent bug exposed a mismatch between the formal model and the real implementation. The post underscores that formal proofs are not a substitute for testing and real-world validation. It also highlights how small modeling gaps can lead to surprising failures.
items.summary_zh: Lean 证明了该程序正确；随后作者发现实现与模型之间的不匹配导致了漏洞。该文强调形式化证明不能替代测试和现实世界的验证。还指出微小的建模差异也会导致意想不到的失败。

items.title_en: US Bill Mandates On-Device Age Verification
items.title_zh: 美国法案要求设备端进行年龄验证
items.summary_en: New US bill proposes on-device age verification, raising privacy and accessibility questions. While aiming to curb underage access, critics warn about potential privacy erosion and user friction across devices.
items.summary_zh: 该法案要求在设备端进行年龄验证，意在限制未成年用户访问某些内容。批评者担心隐私侵蚀、用户体验受阻及在不同设备上的落地难题。

items.title_en: The "Passive Income" trap ate a generation of entrepreneurs
items.title_zh: “被动收入陷阱吞噬了一代创业者”
items.summary_en: The 'passive income' dream attracted a generation of entrepreneurs who chased effortless earnings, often via courses, scams, or ineffective automation. The piece argues the trap distracted people from building durable products and real cash flow.
items.summary_zh: '被动收入'的幻觉吸引了一代创业者，许多人追求不劳而获的收益，往往通过课程、骗局或无效的自动化实现。文章指出这类陷阱让人偏离打造可持续产品与稳定现金流的现实路径。

items.title_en: FSF trying to contact Google about spammer sending 10k+ mails from Gmail account
items.title_zh: FSF 向 Google 求助，处理 Gmail 账号滥用
items.summary_en: The Free Software Foundation is reaching out to Google about a Gmail account being used to send more than 10,000 messages, highlighting ongoing abuse and the limits of automated spam controls. The case underscores the need for effective abuse reporting and remediation workflows.
items.summary_zh: 自由软件基金会正联系 Google，处理一个 Gmail 账号滥用事件，该账号发送超过 1 万封邮件，暴露出持续的滥用问题及自动化反垃圾机制的局限。此事凸显了高效的滥用报告与纠正流程的必要性。

items.title_en: Cal.com is going closed source
items.title_zh: Cal.com 将走向闭源
items.summary_en: Cal.com pivots to closed source, signaling a shift away from community-driven development. The move highlights tensions between openness and monetization in open-source projects and could affect contributors and users.
items.summary_zh: Cal.com 转向闭源，显示出远离社区驱动开发的趋势。此举凸显开源项目在开放性与商业化之间的矛盾，可能影响贡献者与用户的长期利益。

items.title_en: Microsoft isn't removing Copilot from Windows 11, it's just renaming it
items.title_zh: 微软并未删除 Windows 11 的 Copilot，只是改名
items.summary_en: Microsoft is keeping Copilot in Windows 11 but rebranding it, signaling a broader strategy to unify AI-assisted features across Windows. The rename could affect user expectations and how privacy and data usage are communicated.
items.summary_zh: 微软保留 Windows 11 版 Copilot，仅重新命名，显示出将 AI 助力功能统一到 Windows 生态的策略。改名可能影响用户预期，并对隐私与数据使用的传达产生影响。

items.title_en: I gave every train in New York an instrument
items.title_zh: 我给纽约所有列车都装上了乐器
items.summary_en: TrainJazz outfits NYC trains with a different instrument, creating an evolving city soundtrack; it explores data sonification and public space as music. It highlights how creative data projects can repurpose transit systems into interactive art while inviting public participation.
items.summary_zh: TrainJazz 给纽约地铁列车配上乐器，形成不断变化的城市声景。此项目把数据声音化与公共空间艺术结合，体现了将交通系统转化为互动音乐的潜力，同时鼓励公众参与。

items.title_en: Mozilla Thunderbolt
items.title_zh: Mozilla 雷霆
items.summary_en: Mozilla Thunderbolt appears to be a new project from Mozilla, signaling a fresh direction for the organization.
items.summary_zh: Mozilla 雷霆似乎是 Mozilla 的一个新项目，预示着该组织的全新定位。

items.title_en: Apple has removed most of the towns and villages in Lebanon from Apple maps?
items.title_zh: 苹果地图在黎巴嫩移除了大部分城镇和村庄？
items.summary_en: Apple Maps has reportedly removed most towns and villages from Lebanon, creating large gaps in local navigation data. The move raises questions about data sourcing, geopolitical boundaries, and the reliability of mapping services in conflict zones, with potential knock-on effects for travel, logistics, and crisis response.
items.summary_zh: 报道称苹果地图在黎巴嫩几乎不再显示大多数城镇和村庄，导致本地导航数据出现明显空白。此举引发关于数据来源、界限划分以及冲突地区地图服务可靠性的关注，可能影响出行、物流和应急响应。

items.title_en: Thoughts and feelings around Claude Design
items.title_zh: 关于 Claude Design 的思考与感受
items.summary_en: A reflective look at Claude Design, analyzing how interface choices and safety features shape user interactions, personality, and trust in AI copilots.
items.summary_zh: 本文从设计角度审视 Claude Design，探讨界面选择、个性化与安全性如何影响用户互动、信任与体验。揭示当代 AI 助手在 UX 设计上的取舍及其对日常使用的影响。

items.title_en: Open Source Isn't Dead
items.title_zh: 开源并未死去，Cal.com 学到了错误的一课
items.summary_en: Open source isn't dead, but Cal.com demonstrates a flawed response to AI disruption. Rather than retreating, sustaining open ecosystems requires thoughtful governance and continued collaboration.
items.summary_zh: 开源并未死去，但 Cal.com 的做法暴露了对 AI 变革的错误应对。与其退缩，不断开放与社区治理的平衡才是维系开源生态的关键。

items.title_en: We have a 99% email reputation, but Gmail disagrees
items.title_zh: 我们的邮件信誉高达99%，但 Gmail 不认同
items.summary_en: Despite claiming a 99% email reputation score from one service, Gmail disagrees, leading to confusion about deliverability. The incident highlights variability in reputation metrics and the importance of robust email authentication practices.
items.summary_zh: 尽管某服务给出99%的邮件信誉分，但 Gmail 的判定并不认同，导致投递问题与误解。此事凸显邮件信誉评估之间的差异以及强化 DKIM/SPF 等认证、送达策略的重要性。

items.title_en: I’m spending months coding the old way
items.title_zh: 我正在花数月用手工编码
items.summary_en: An introspective look at spending months coding by hand instead of relying on modern tooling. It digs into the discipline, focus, and craftsmanship required to sustain a long project with manual methods. The piece argues that slow, deliberate work can deepen understanding even if it costs speed.
items.summary_zh: 这是一篇对坚持用手工编码、数月之久的反思性记录。文章探讨在长周期项目中保持专注、工艺感和自我约束所需的纪律。尽管速度下降，作者认为这种慢节奏的工作能带来更深的理解。

items.title_en: Notion leaks email addresses of all editors of any public page
items.title_zh: Notion 泄露公开页面编辑者的邮箱地址
items.summary_en: Notion reportedly leaked email addresses for editors of any public page, widening phishing and social-engineering risks for those editors. The exposure underscores how collaboration platforms can inadvertently leak contact data, prompting urgent checks on access, password hygiene, and alerting for targeted scams.
items.summary_zh: Notion 被曝公开页面编辑者的邮箱地址，扩大了他们遭遇钓鱼与社工攻击的风险。此类暴露凸显协作工具对外共享联系信息的潜在隐患，需紧急检查权限、提升密码安全并警惕定向诈骗。

items.title_en: This year’s insane timeline of hacks
items.title_zh: 今年最疯狂的黑客事件时间线
items.summary_en: A rapid chronicle of major hacks across various sectors this year, showcasing attack surfaces from supply-chain breaches to ransomware. It underscores the need for stronger defense, faster incident response, and transparent disclosure.
items.summary_zh: 本年度出现的一系列重大黑客事件被整理成时间线，覆盖供应链攻击到勒索软件等多种场景。事件强调需要更强的防御、快速的事件响应和透明披露。

items.title_en: Everything we like is a psyop?
items.title_zh: 我们喜欢的一切都是心理战吗
items.summary_en: A TechCrunch piece argues that much of what we enjoy is shaped by psychological operations, highlighting how media, marketing, and social design influence taste and behavior. It cautions readers to question narratives and maintain healthy skepticism.
items.summary_zh: TechCrunch 指出，我们喜爱的很多东西可能被心理战操控，媒体、营销和社交设计对口味与行为具有放大效应。文章提醒读者保持批判性思维，避免被表象驱动的叙事带偏。

items.title_en: Official Clojure Documentary page with Video, Shownotes, and Links
items.title_zh: 官方 Clojure 纪录片页面，含视频与资料链接
items.summary_en: The documentary page for Clojure bundles video, show notes, and links that trace the language's origins, philosophy, and ecosystem. It serves as a focused resource for both newcomers and long-time fans to explore Clojure's impact.
items.summary_zh: Clojure 官方纪录片页面提供视频、讲解要点和相关链接，梳理该语言的起源、哲学及生态系统。为新手和长期拥护者提供深入了解 Clojure 影响的资源。

items.title_en: Building a CLI for all of Cloudflare
items.title_zh: 为 Cloudflare 构建一个覆盖全域的 CLI 工具
items.summary_en: Cloudflare demonstrates a local explorer CLI that lets developers probe and test Cloudflare features offline, speeding iteration and debugging.
items.summary_zh: Cloudflare 展示了一个本地 CLI 探索工具，便于开发者在离线状态下试用和查看 Cloudflare 的功能，从而提升开发效率与离线调试能力。文章讨论了如何设计一个安全且易用、覆盖广泛功能的命令行界面。

items.title_en: Ask HN: What Are You Working On? (April 2026)
items.title_zh: Ask HN：你在做什么？（2026 年 4 月）
items.summary_en: Developers share a mix of side projects, product experiments, and work-in-progress ideas, reflecting current tech interests. Topics span AI tooling, cloud infrastructure, and deployment hurdles, offering a barometer of what a tech audience is tinkering with in April 2026.
items.summary_zh: 开发者分享本月正在做的项目、产品实验和在研点子，揭示当前的技术趋势。话题涵盖 AI 工具、云基础设施与部署挑战，为技术人群在 2026 年 4 月的热议方向提供风向标。

items.title_en: Ask HN: Who is using OpenClaw?
items.title_zh: Ask HN：誰在使用 OpenClaw？
items.summary_en: People share real-world experiences with OpenClaw, including use cases and deployment notes, going beyond hype with practical feedback. The discussion helps readers gauge maturity and community support. For anyone considering adopting it, peer insights can be highly informative.
items.summary_zh: 討論串匯聚了對 OpenClaw 的實際使用經驗、案例與部署筆記，提供比官方說明更具體的評估。讀者可透過同行的回饋判斷其成熟度與社群支持程度。若考慮採用，這些觀察相當有幫助。

items.title_en: ChatGPT for Excel
items.title_zh: Excel 的 ChatGPT
items.summary_en: The integration brings natural language and AI-driven insights into spreadsheets, letting users generate formulas, clean data, and summarize trends from plain language prompts. It signals a broader shift toward AI-assisted productivity in office tools.
items.summary_zh: 将自然语言和 AI 能力引入电子表格，用户可通过简单提示生成公式、清理数据并总结趋势。这标志着办公软件中 AI 辅助生产力的进一步普及。

items.title_en: The Future of Everything Is Lies, I Guess: Safety
items.title_zh: 未来的一切都是谎言，关于安全
items.summary_en: A provocative take arguing that safety notions in tech are often inconsistent or misguided, challenging readers to rethink how risk is defined and managed in real-world systems.
items.summary_zh: 作者质疑科技领域的安全概念，认为对安全的定义和实现常常不一致甚至误导，挑战读者重新审视现实世界中的风险管理。

items.title_en: NASA Force
items.title_zh: NASA Force
items.summary_en: NASA Force appears to be a newly announced NASA project or initiative with limited public details.
items.summary_zh: NASA Force 似乎是美国国家航空航天局新宣布的一个项目或计划，但公开细节有限。

items.title_en: YouTube users get option to set their Shorts time limit to zero minutes
items.title_zh: YouTube 用户现在可将 Shorts 时长限制设为零分钟
items.summary_en: YouTube is testing a control that lets creators cap Shorts length at zero minutes, effectively suppressing Shorts on a channel. The move hints at platform-level content controls and the friction points of recommendation-driven video ecosystems.
items.summary_zh: YouTube 正在测试一项控件，允许创作者把 Shorts 的时长上限设为零分钟，从而在频道层面抑制 Shorts 的呈现。这体现了平台级内容控制的探索以及以推荐驱动的视频生态的痛点。

items.title_en: Traders placed over $1B in perfectly timed bets on the Iran war
items.title_zh: 交易者在伊朗战争上下注超过10亿美元，时机极其精准
items.summary_en: The piece reports that traders placed more than a billion dollars in perfectly timed bets tied to the Iran war. It underscores the tension between speed and scrutiny in crisis-driven trading.
items.summary_zh: 文章指出交易者在伊朗战争相关的事件上下了超过10亿美元的注码，时机极为精准。此事揭示地缘政治事件如何带来高额套利机会，也引发对市场伦理和透明度的质疑。强调在危机驱动的交易中，速度与监管之间的张力。

items.title_en: The seven programming ur-languages (2022)
items.title_zh: 编程之祖：七种原始语言（2022）
items.summary_en: The post surveys seven foundational languages that shaped modern programming, tracing how concepts from these roots influence today’s language design and tooling. It also reflects on what we gain by revisiting these roots, and which ideas still matter for building robust, expressive software.
items.summary_zh: 本文梳理了七种塑造现代编程的基础语言，追溯其思想如何影响当今的语言设计与工具链。回顾根源可以帮助理解当代语言的优缺点，哪些理念在构建健壮且高效的软件时仍然重要。

items.title_en: YouTube now world's largest media company, topping Disney
items.title_zh: YouTube 现为全球最大的媒体公司，超越迪士尼
items.summary_en: YouTube has eclipsed Disney as the world's largest media company, reflecting the shift from traditional studios to platform-driven content ecosystems and creator monetization. The milestone highlights the enduring power of scale, reach, and data-driven content strategy, while inviting questions about regulation and creator economics.
items.summary_zh: YouTube 已超越迪士尼成为全球最大的媒体公司，凸显了平台化内容生态与创作者商业化的崛起。此里程碑反映出规模、覆盖范围与数据驱动内容策略的力量，同时也引发关于监管和创作者经济的新讨论。

items.title_en: Android CLI: Build Android apps 3x faster using any agent
items.title_zh: Android CLI：用任意代理将应用构建速度提高 3 倍
items.summary_en: Google highlights a new Android CLI workflow that offloads build steps to any agent, enabling parallelization and faster turnaround. The approach unlocks faster app iteration in both local and CI environments.
items.summary_zh: Android CLI 引入可将构建任务分发给任意代理的工作流，实现并行化和约 3 倍的提速。此举有助于本地和持续集成环境中的应用迭代更快。

items.title_en: Cloudflare's AI Platform: an inference layer designed for agents
items.title_zh: Cloudflare 的 AI 平台：面向代理的推断层
items.summary_en: Cloudflare unveils an AI Platform with an inference layer tailored for autonomous agents, enabling developers to run agent-powered workflows at scale with privacy and edge considerations. This marks Cloudflare's broader shift toward AI infrastructure, complementing its edge network.
items.summary_zh: Cloudflare 推出 AI 平台，提供面向代理的推断层，使开发者能够在规模化环境中以隐私与边缘计算为考量部署代理驱动的工作流。这标志着 Cloudflare 在 AI 基础设施领域的扩张。

items.title_en: Show HN: I made a calculator that works over disjoint sets of intervals
items.title_zh: Show HN：我做了一个在不相交区间集合上运算的计算器
items.summary_en: Inputs are disjoint intervals; arithmetic is performed piecewise, returning a union of intervals. This demonstrates practical interval arithmetic and could enable robust numeric reasoning in uncertain data, scheduling windows, or streaming computations.
items.summary_zh: 把输入视作不相交区间的并集，逐段进行运算，结果仍然是区间的并集。这样的区间算术在处理不确定数据、时间窗口调度或流式计算时具有实际应用价值。

items.title_en: "cat readme.txt" is not safe if you use iTerm2
items.title_zh: 在 iTerm2 中，cat readme.txt 不安全
items.summary_en: iTerm2 has a vulnerability where displaying certain files can trigger unsafe behavior by misinterpreting control sequences. This highlights how terminal emulators can become attack surfaces via crafted content, prompting fixes or safer workflows. Users should apply updates and consider more conservative command patterns when viewing untrusted files.
items.summary_zh: iTerm2 存在一个漏洞，显示包含特定控制序列的文件时可能触发安全风险。这揭示了终端仿真在处理未信任内容时的攻击面，促使开发者修复与用户调整工作流。建议更新并在查看非信任文件时采用更保守的命令模式。

items.title_en: Israel escalates attacks on medics in Lebanon with deadly 'quadruple tap'
items.title_zh: 以色列对黎巴嫩医务人员发动致命四连击的升级行动
items.summary_en: Israel escalates its strikes on medical personnel in Lebanon, delivering a deadly quadruple-tap that raises civilian-protection concerns. The violence threatens humanitarian operations and could widen regional tensions as aid workers struggle to reach affected communities.
items.summary_zh: 以色列对黎巴嫩医务人员的空袭升级，实施致命的“四连击”行动，引发对平民保护的担忧。此类攻击可能削弱人道救援行动并使边境地区局势更加紧张。

items.title_en: Are the costs of AI agents also rising exponentially? (2025)
items.title_zh: AI 代理成本是否也在指数级上升？（2025）
items.summary_en: An exploration of whether AI agent costs are growing exponentially, analyzing factors like compute, data, and maintenance, and projecting implications for deployment economics in 2025 and beyond. The takeaway: cost curves matter for long-term planning and may influence adoption, pricing, and governance.
items.summary_zh: 探讨 AI 代理成本是否呈指数级增长，分析算力、数据与维护等因素对 2025 年及以后的部署经济性的影响。结论表明成本曲线对长期规划至关重要，可能影响采用节奏、定价与治理策略。

items.title_en: Google Gemma 4 Runs Natively on iPhone with Full Offline AI Inference
items.title_zh: Google Gemma 4 在 iPhone 上原生运行并实现离线推理
items.summary_en: Gemma 4 now runs on iPhone with native offline AI inference, marking a notable step toward fully on-device AI. The move tightens privacy, reduces latency, and challenges cloud-dependent app workflows, especially for on-device assistants and text/image processing.
items.summary_zh: Gemma 4 现在可在 iPhone 上原生运行，实现完全离线的 AI 推理。这一进展提升了隐私保护、降低了延迟，并挑战以云端为中心的应用工作流，尤其是对移动端助手和文本/图像处理应用。

items.title_en: The future of everything is lies, I guess: Work
items.title_zh: 我猜，一切未来都是谎言：工作
items.summary_en: Challenging grand forecasts for the future of work, the piece argues progress comes from pragmatic experiments and iterative improvements rather than sweeping predictions. It emphasizes humility and learning from real-world workflows to decide what actually helps people get things done.
items.summary_zh: 文章质疑关于未来工作的宏大预测，强调真正的改进来自务实的试验和迭代优化，而非空泛的愿景。指出在现实工作场景中逐步试错、保持谦逊，才能找到真正提升效率的方法。

items.title_en: OpenSSL 4.0.0
items.title_zh: OpenSSL 4.0.0 发布
items.summary_en: OpenSSL 4.0.0 release ships with critical security fixes and updated APIs that may require downstream updates. The update reflects OpenSSL's ongoing evolution and the importance of patching cryptography libraries in software ecosystems.
items.summary_zh: OpenSSL 4.0.0 发布，包含关键安全修复和更新的 API，可能需要下游应用相应更新。这一版本体现了 OpenSSL 的持续演进，强调在软件生态中对加密库进行打补丁的重要性。

items.title_en: Hyperscalers have already outspent most famous US megaprojects
items.title_zh: 超大规模云服务商已超过美国最著名的 megaprojects 的开支
items.summary_en: Analysts note that hyperscalers have already outspent many famous US megaprojects, underscoring the scale and speed of cloud investments relative to public infrastructure.
items.summary_zh: 分析师指出，超大规模云服务商的开支已经超过了许多著名的美国 megaprojects，凸显云端投资的规模与速度相对于公共基础设施的增长。

items.title_en: Vercel Says Internal Systems Hit in Breach
items.title_zh: Vercel 称内部系统遭遇入侵
items.summary_en: Vercel disclosed a breach that affected its internal systems and is actively investigating and containing the incident. The disclosure suggests potential disruption to internal tooling and admin access, though there’s no official statement of customer data exposure. The event underscores ongoing cloud-security risks and the importance of rapid incident response.
items.summary_zh: Vercel 公布其内部系统遭遇入侵，正在进行调查和止损。公告称可能影响内部工具与管理员访问，但尚未确认客户数据泄露。此事件凸显云服务提供商面临的持续安全风险，以及快速应对的重要性。

items.title_en: Introspective Diffusion Language Models
items.title_zh: 自省式扩散语言模型
items.summary_en: Introspective diffusion language models aim to improve generation by having the model inspect and refine its own outputs during the diffusion process. This self-evaluation approach could reduce hallucinations and improve reliability on long or complex tasks. If practical, it could influence future LM design and prompting strategies.
items.summary_zh: 自省式扩散语言模型通过在扩散过程中让模型审视并改进自己的输出，提升生成的准确性与稳定性。该方法有望减少幻觉现象，尤其是在长文本或复杂任务中的表现。若落地，将影响未来的语言模型设计与提示策略。

items.title_en: The paper computer
items.title_zh: 纸上计算机
items.summary_en: It challenges hardware prerequisites assumptions and offers practical ideas for education and rapid prototyping.
items.summary_zh: 本文展示如何用纸张和简单材料搭建一台计算机，演示逻辑门甚至基础计算，成本极低。为教育与快速原型开发提供了新的思路，挑战了对硬件的传统门槛观念。

items.title_en: The Future of Everything Is Lies, I Guess: New Jobs
items.title_zh: 未来的一切都是谎言：新职业
items.summary_en: Aphyr's post argues about the unreliable nature of predicting the 'future of everything' and riffs on new tech jobs, emphasizing that the job landscape will keep evolving as AI and automation mature. The piece cautions against overconfidence in forecasts.
items.summary_zh: Aphyr 的博文质疑“未来的一切”预测的可靠性，并以新兴技术岗位为例，强调随着 AI 与自动化的发展，职业格局将持续演变，提醒人们避免过于自信的预测。

items.title_en: Why are Flock employees watching our children?
items.title_zh: Flock 员工为何在监看我们的孩子？
items.summary_en: The piece raises privacy concerns about a service where employees monitor children, highlighting governance gaps, consent, and potential misuse of footage. It calls for stronger oversight, clearer data policies, and user controls.
items.summary_zh: 文章对某项由 Flock 员工监看儿童的服务提出隐私担忧，强调治理缺口、同意与视频使用的潜在滥用风险。呼吁加强监督、明确数据政策，并提供用户控制权。

items.title_en: Ada, its design, and the language that built the languages
items.title_zh: Ada：它的设计与催生多种语言的语言
items.summary_en: The piece revisits Ada's design principles—strong typing, modularity, and reliability—and traces how these ideas influenced later programming languages and safety-critical systems. It argues that Ada's careful language engineering served as a blueprint for maintaining correctness as software ecosystems grew complex. For language designers and practitioners, Ada's legacy offers lessons on verifiability and defensive programming.
items.summary_zh: 本文回顾了 Ada 的设计原则——强类型、模块化与可可靠性，并追溯这些思想如何影响了后来的编程语言和面向安全的系统。它指出，Ada 在软件生态日益复杂的时代提供了一套保持正确性的蓝图。对于语言设计者与从业者而言，Ada 的遗产提供了可验证性与防御性编程的宝贵经验。

items.title_en: Playdate’s handheld changed how Duke University teaches game design
items.title_zh: Playdate 手持设备改变了杜克大学游戏设计教学
items.summary_en: Duke University has integrated the Playdate handheld into its game design curriculum, shifting how students approach the craft. The device’s unique inputs and constraints spur rapid prototyping and iterative design, illustrating hardware-enabled pedagogy.
items.summary_zh: 杜克大学在课程中引入 Playdate 手持机，改变了游戏设计的教学方式。独特的输入体验和时间约束促使学生进行快速迭代与原型化，成为教育领域硬件辅助教学的典型案例。

items.title_en: I ran Gemma 4 as a local model in Codex CLI
items.title_zh: Gemma 4 在 Codex CLI 中的本地化运行
items.summary_en: I ran Gemma 4 as a local model using Codex CLI, demonstrating offline inference with a relatively small footprint.
items.summary_zh: 将 Gemma 4 作为本地模型通过 Codex CLI 运行，展示了离线推理的可行性与相对低延迟。开源权重模型在本地实验的可行性为隐私和成本控制提供了机会，但需要权衡部署复杂度与硬件需求。

items.title_en: Middle schooler finds coin from Troy in Berlin
items.title_zh: 柏林发现来自特洛伊的硬币的中学生
items.summary_en: A middle school student uncovered a coin dating to ancient Troy in Berlin, connecting modern classrooms with distant histories. The Trojan origin underscores how artifacts surface in urban contexts and shed light on ancient trade networks. The find also highlights youth involvement in archaeology.
items.summary_zh: 一名中学生在柏林发现了一枚来自特洛伊时期的硬币，将现代课堂与遥远历史连接起来。这枚特洛伊来源的硬币凸显文物在都市环境中的出现及对古代贸易网络的启示。此发现也凸显了青少年参与考古学研究的重要性。

items.title_en: Sometimes powerful people just do dumb shit
items.title_zh: 有时有权势的人也会做蠢事
items.summary_en: An essay reflecting on how powerful individuals sometimes act foolishly, offering observations about accountability and the consequences for tech and leadership.
items.summary_zh: 讨论掌权者偶尔犯错的现象，反思权力、问责与技术行业中的决策后果。

items.title_en: Taking on CUDA with ROCm: 'One Step After Another'
items.title_zh: 以 ROCm 逐步挑战 CUDA
items.summary_en: AMD's ROCm roadmap aims to compete with CUDA through incremental improvements, focusing on portability, kernel compilation, and performance optimizations. The approach underscores the difficulty of breaking NVIDIA's software moat and the need for strong open standards in GPU computing.
items.summary_zh: AMD 的 ROCm 计划通过渐进改进与 CUDA 竞争，聚焦可移植性、内核编译与性能优化。该策略凸显打破 NVIDIA 软件生态护城河的难度，同时也强调在 GPU 计算领域坚持开源标准的重要性。

items.title_en: New unsealed records reveal Amazon's price-fixing tactics, California AG claims
items.title_zh: 新解封记录披露亚马逊定价策略，加州检方指控
items.summary_en: Unsealed records reportedly reveal Amazon’s price-fixing tactics, per California AG claims. The disclosures could intensify antitrust scrutiny, influencing regulatory actions and consumer perceptions of online pricing.
items.summary_zh: 据称，解封记录揭示了亚马逊的定价策略，加州总检察长据此提出指控。这些披露可能加剧反垄断审查，影响监管行动与消费者对线上定价的看法。

items.title_en: Stanford report highlights growing disconnect between AI insiders and everyone
items.title_zh: 斯坦福报告：AI 内部人士与公众之间的脱节日益扩大
items.summary_en: A Stanford study finds AI insiders are more optimistic about timelines and risks than the general public, widening the gap in understanding and trust. The result has implications for policy, governance, and how AI products are explained to non-experts.
items.summary_zh: 斯坦福的研究显示 AI 内部人士对未来时间线和风险更乐观，公众理解与信任之间的差距正在扩大。研究结果对政策、治理以及向非专业人士解释 AI 产品有重要影响。

items.title_en: Fixing a 20-year-old bug in Enlightenment E16
items.title_zh: 修复 Enlightenment E16 的一个 20 年前的 bug
items.summary_en: A long-standing bug in the Enlightenment E16 window manager is fixed, illustrating the ongoing work of maintaining aging open-source software. The post walks through the debugging journey and the payoff of stabilizing a legacy desktop environment.
items.summary_zh: 对 Enlightenment E16 的一个长期遗留 bug 已修复，体现了维护老旧开源软件的挑战。文中讲述调试过程与问题根源，展示对遗留桌面环境的稳定性提升。

items.title_en: Viktor Orbán concedes defeat after 'painful' election result
items.title_zh: 维克托·欧尔班在痛苦的选举结果后承认失败
items.summary_en: Prime Minister Viktor Orbán has conceded defeat following a painful election result, signaling a rare churn in Hungary's political dynamics. The outcome could portend changes in Hungary's stance toward the EU, media freedom, civil society, and regional alignment.
items.summary_zh: 维克多·欧尔班在痛苦的选举结果后宣布失败，显示匈牙利政治格局或将发生转变。结果可能改变匈牙利在对欧盟、媒体自由、民间社会及区域关系方面的立场与走向。

items.title_en: WiiFin – Jellyfin Client for Nintendo Wii
items.title_zh: WiiFin：面向 Nintendo Wii 的 Jellyfin 客户端
items.summary_en: WiiFin is a Jellyfin client for the Nintendo Wii, enabling media streaming on retro hardware. It demonstrates how open-source media projects extend to older consoles, though the experience is constrained by the platform's limits.
items.summary_zh: WiiFin 是面向 Nintendo Wii 的 Jellyfin 客户端，允许在这台老旧主机上从 Jellyfin 服务器流媒体。该项目展示了开源媒体生态向旧硬件的扩展潜力，但受限于硬件性能与控制体验。

items.title_en: Amiga Graphics Archive
items.title_zh: Amiga 图形档案
items.summary_en: The Amiga Graphics Archive curates historical graphics, demos, and artwork from the Amiga era. It serves both retro computing fans and researchers studying early digital art pipelines. The collection helps preserve a pivotal chapter of personal computing history.
items.summary_zh: Amiga 图形档案整理并保留了 Amiga 时代的图形素材、演示和作品。它既是复古计算爱好者的宝库，也是研究早期数字艺术流程的宝贵资源。该收藏有助于保存个人计算历史中关键的一页。

items.title_en: Changes in the system prompt between Claude Opus 4.6 and 4.7
items.title_zh: Claude Opus 4.6 与 4.7 的系统提示变更
items.summary_en: Describes updates to the model's system prompt between Claude Opus 4.6 and 4.7, showcasing how tiny prompt design changes can affect behavior, safety, and output style. The note emphasizes the importance of prompt engineering on LLMs and how platform updates can shift capabilities and guardrails.
items.summary_zh: 介绍了 Claude Opus 4.6 与 4.7 的系统提示变更，展示了微小的提示设计差异对模型行为、安全边界和输出风格的影响。强调提示工程在大型语言模型中的重要性，以及平台更新如何改变能力与约束。

items.title_en: Does Gas Town 'steal' usage from users' LLM credits to improve itself?
items.title_zh: Gas Town 是否从用户的 LLM 使用额度窃取来提升自身？
items.summary_en: The discussion questions whether Gas Town misuses users' LLM usage credits to improve its own models, pointing to opaque incentives and data usage policies. It argues for greater transparency, auditability, and clear user consent.
items.summary_zh: 讨论质疑 Gas Town 是否在未告知的情况下从用户的 LLM 使用额度中获利提升自身模型，指出激励与数据使用政策不透明。呼吁增加透明度、可审计性以及明确的用户同意。

items.title_en: Do you even need a database?
items.title_zh: 你真的需要数据库吗？
items.summary_en: Do you really need a database? The piece challenges default database assumptions, exploring alternatives like event sourcing, in-memory stores, or serverless options for certain workloads.
items.summary_zh: 真的需要数据库吗？文章质疑默认使用数据库的假设，探讨事件源、内存存储或无服务等在特定工作负载中的替代方案。

items.title_en: Codex Hacked a Samsung TV
items.title_zh: Codex 破解 Samsung 电视
items.summary_en: Researchers demonstrate that a Samsung TV can be hacked using Codex-inspired techniques, underscoring the security risks in smart TVs and the need for robust firmware protections.
items.summary_zh: 研究者演示了利用 Codex 风格的技术入侵三星电视，凸显智能电视的安全风险以及加强固件保护的必要性。

items.title_en: Show HN: PanicLock – Close your MacBook lid disable TouchID –> password unlock
items.title_zh: PanicLock：合上 MacBook 盖时禁用 Touch ID，改用密码解锁
items.summary_en: PanicLock is a small utility that disables Touch ID when the MacBook lid is closed and requires a password to unlock. It provides a simple privacy safeguard for scenarios like lending or transporting devices, though it adds an extra unlock step.
items.summary_zh: PanicLock 是一个小型工具，合上 MacBook 盖时会禁用指纹解锁，解锁需输入密码。这为借出或携带设备等场景提供了简单的隐私保护，但也增加了额外的解锁步骤。

items.title_en: Phyphox – Physical Experiments Using a Smartphone
items.title_zh: Phyphox：用智能手机进行物理实验
items.summary_en: Phyphox enables physical experiments using smartphone sensors, turning everyday devices into lab instruments. It lowers barriers for STEM education and fieldwork by offering ready-made experiments and data collection tools.
items.summary_zh: Phyphox 让智能手机内置传感器成为物理实验工具，降低教育与现场实验的门槛。通过现成的实验和数据采集工具，方便教师与学生进行动手研究。

items.title_en: What are skiplists good for?
items.title_zh: 跳表有什么用？
items.summary_en: Skip lists offer an elegant alternative to balanced trees, giving O(log n) average-time search, insert, and delete with a probabilistic tower of forward pointers. They shine in concurrent and persistent contexts where simpler implementation and easier lock-free designs trump rigid balancing, and they support efficient range queries.
items.summary_zh: 跳表提供了一个优雅的替代平衡树的方案，平均时间复杂度为 O(log n) 的查找、插入和删除，依赖一个随机的多层指针结构。在并发和持久化场景中，它比复杂的平衡树实现更易于采用，且便于无锁设计，同时支持高效的区间查询。

items.title_en: Elevated errors on Claude.ai, API, Claude Code
items.title_zh: Claude.ai、API、Claude Code 均出现更高错误率
items.summary_en: Claude's services report elevated error rates across web, API, and Code surfaces, signaling an incident or degraded service. Expect outages and monitor status updates for remediation progress.
items.summary_zh: Claude 的网页、API 和 Claude Code 服务报告更高的错误率，表明可能发生故障或性能下降。请关注状态更新并准备应对潜在的中断。

items.title_en: Category Theory Illustrated – Orders
items.title_zh: 范畴论图解：序
items.summary_en: This installment explains how orders (posets) fit into category theory, using diagrams to link simple order relations to categorical constructs. It shows how monotone maps, functors, and universal properties arise from basic ordering ideas. The piece clarifies how a seemingly simple concept underpins many abstract techniques in math and CS.
items.summary_zh: 本期通过图示讲解序（偏序集）在范畴论中的定位，展示如何把基本的序关系映射到态射、函子和极限等概念。内容揭示单调映射、函子以及泛性质等是如何从简单的序关系中产生的。帮助读者理解一个看似简单的概念在数学和计算中的抽象技巧中的核心作用。

items.title_en: Show HN: Oberon System 3 runs natively on Raspberry Pi 3 (with ready SD card)
items.title_zh: Show HN：Oberon System 3 可原生在 Raspberry Pi 3 上运行（含现成 SD 卡）
items.summary_en: A demo shows Oberon System 3 running natively on Raspberry Pi 3, accompanied by a ready-to-use SD card image. It demonstrates how a compact, single-tasking OS can still be useful for education and experimentation on modern SBCs.
items.summary_zh: 演示展示 Oberon System 3 在 Raspberry Pi 3 上原生运行，并提供现成的 SD 卡镜像。此举显示了简约、单任务操作系统在现代单板计算机上的教育与试验潜力。

items.title_en: Wacli – WhatsApp CLI
items.title_zh: Wacli — WhatsApp 命令行工具：同步、搜索、发送
items.summary_en: Wacli is a command-line tool for WhatsApp that can sync messages, search history, and send messages from the terminal. It enables automation and scripting around messaging workflows.
items.summary_zh: Wacli 是一个 WhatsApp 命令行工具，支持同步、搜索和发送消息，便于在脚本与自动化工作流中使用 WhatsApp。

items.title_en: Slop Cop
items.title_zh: Slop Cop 项目
items.summary_en: Slop Cop is a project with an enigmatic title exploring a messy system, software, or policy topic.
items.summary_zh: Slop Cop 是一个标题颇为谜样的项目，探讨一个混乱的系统、软件或政策议题。

items.title_en: Sumida Aquarium Posts 2026 Penguin Relationship Chart, with Drama and Breakups
items.title_zh: 墨田水族馆2026企鹅关系图：戏剧与分手
items.summary_en: A whimsical 2026 update detailing penguin relationships at Sumida Aquarium, presented as a relationship chart with narrative drama. It blends data visualization with light-hearted storytelling, reflecting the playful side of institutional communications.
items.summary_zh: 这是对墨田水族馆 2026 年企鹅关系的趣味更新，以下列关系图呈现并夹带戏剧与分手等情节。将数据可视化与轻松叙事结合，体现机构沟通中的趣味侧面。

items.title_en: The quiet disappearance of the free-range childhood
items.title_zh: 自由放养童年的悄然消失
items.summary_en: The piece argues that modern parenting, urbanization, and technology have eroded opportunities for kids to roam freely, with safety concerns and structured schedules. It discusses cognitive and social impacts, suggesting ways to reclaim freer, exploratory childhood experiences.
items.summary_zh: 文章认为现代生活逐渐剥夺了孩子在自由探索中的成长空间，受城市化、日程安排与科技的共同影响。讨论潜在的认知与社交成本，并提出重拾自由游戏与探索的想法。

items.title_en: The RAM shortage could last years
items.title_zh: RAM短缺可能持续数年
items.summary_en: RAM shortages driven by surging AI workloads and ongoing supply-chain constraints may persist for years, keeping memory prices volatile. Consumers could see higher prices and tighter availability for PCs and consumer devices, while data centers face tougher procurement as demand stays elevated. The situation underscores how AI demand can reshape even core hardware markets.
items.summary_zh: RAM 短缺可能持续多年，AI、云计算对内存的需求持续高位，叠加产能瓶颈。对消费电子和服务器市场将带来价格与库存的持续压力。

items.title_en: Ask HN: How did you land your first projects as a solo engineer/consultant?
items.title_zh: Ask HN：你是如何作为独立工程师/顾问拿下第一份项目的？
items.summary_en: A community thread where solo developers share practical routes to land their first paying projects, from portfolio strategy to outreach, pricing, and building trust with clients. The takeaway is that small wins—prototyping, freelancing platforms, and leveraging networks—often compound into steady early contracts.
items.summary_zh: 社区讨论中，独立开发者分享获得第一份有偿项目的实用途径，包括作品集、对接方式、定价与建立客户信任。实践经验表明，通过小型项目、自由职业平台和人脉网络等方式积累，往往能逐步形成稳定的早期合同。

items.title_en: I just want simple S3
items.title_zh: 我只想要一个简单的 S3
items.summary_en: The post argues for a simpler S3 experience or proposes a minimal S3 API layer to reduce boilerplate, with practical tips or a simpler alternative; It may propose a design for a friendlier S3-like storage.
items.summary_zh: 文章主张让 S3 使用更简单，提出简化 API 层或替代方案的要点，降低实现成本并提高开发效率。

items.title_en: AI-assisted cognition endangers human development?
items.title_zh: AI 辅助认知会危及人类发展吗？
items.summary_en: The piece questions whether AI-assisted cognition—like externalizing thinking to AI—could hamper deep learning, critical thinking, and healthy development in humans. It discusses trade-offs between efficiency gains and cognitive skills, and suggests safeguards.
items.summary_zh: 文章质疑让 AI 辅助认知是否会削弱人类的深入学习、批判性思维与健康发展，探讨效率提升与认知技能之间的权衡，并提出相应的防护措施。

items.title_en: NIST gives up enriching most CVEs
items.title_zh: NIST 放弃对大多数 CVE 的丰富信息
items.summary_en: NIST is scaling back its enrichment of CVE entries, reducing depth and metadata for most vulnerabilities. The move could affect security teams relying on richer CVE data for prioritization and risk assessment, nudging practitioners toward alternative sources. This shift may slow some vulnerability workflows but simplify data curation.
items.summary_zh: 国家信息安全与技术标准局正在缩减对大多数 CVE 条目的丰富化，降低了漏洞数据的深度与元数据质量。此举可能影响依赖更丰富 CVE 数据进行优先级确定与风险评估的安全团队，促使从业者转向其他数据源。这一变化可能让某些漏洞工作流程变慢，但也简化了数据整理。

items.title_en: Airline worker arrested after sharing photos of bomb damage in WhatsApp group
items.title_zh: 航空公司员工在 WhatsApp 群组分享爆炸现场照片被捕
items.summary_en: A airline staffer was arrested after circulating photos of bomb damage in a private WhatsApp group. The incident underscores how sharing sensitive security imagery can breach regulations and expose both individuals and organizations to legal risk, especially for workers tied to critical infrastructure.
items.summary_zh: 一名航空公司员工因在私密 WhatsApp 群组传播爆炸现场照片而被逮捕。这起事件凸显了传播敏感安全图像的风险，可能违反规定并给个人与企业带来法律与安全风险，尤其是在关键基础设施工作中。

items.title_en: AI cybersecurity is not proof of work
items.title_zh: AI 安全性并非工作量证明
items.summary_en: The piece argues that AI-based cybersecurity cannot replace fundamental security practices or proof-of-work style verification. It emphasizes human oversight, layered defenses, and ongoing auditing as essential.
items.summary_zh: 文章指出，AI 驱动的网络安全不能取代基本的安全实践或类似工作量证明的验证，强调需要人类监督、分层防御和持续审计。

items.title_en: Guy builds AI driven hardware hacker arm from duct tape, old cam and CNC machine
items.title_zh: 用胶带、旧摄像头和数控机床打造的 AI 驱动硬件黑客臂
items.summary_en: A DIY project shows an AI-driven robotic arm assembled from duct tape, an old camera, and a CNC machine. It demonstrates how accessible components and lightweight AI tooling can accelerate hardware-hacking workflows and rapid prototyping.
items.summary_zh: 这名爱好者用胶带、旧摄像头和数控机床组装了一只 AI 驱动的硬件黑客臂，展示了低成本材料与 AI 工具链在快速原型与硬件开发中的潜力。

items.title_en: A communist Apple II and fourteen years of not knowing what you're testing
items.title_zh: 一个共产主义 Apple II 与十四年不清楚自己在测试什么
items.summary_en: An oddball meditation on testing practice using a 'communist' Apple II and fourteen years of ambiguity about what is being tested. It surfaces how unclear testing goals spawn unchecked assumptions and free-riding behavior, and it calls for explicit test objectives and provenance in experiments.
items.summary_zh: 以一台“共产主义风格”的 Apple II 与十四年未澄清测试对象的经历为切入点，反映测试目标模糊如何滋生推诿和盲目测试。强调在实验中需要明确的目标、覆盖范围与可追溯性，倡导更清晰的测试边界与记录。

items.title_en: Tesla tells HW3 owner to 'be patient' after 7 years of waiting for FSD
items.title_zh: 特斯拉就 HW3 用户等待七年的 FSD 发出‘请耐心’提示
items.summary_en: Tesla tells HW3 owners to be patient after a seven-year wait for Full Self-Driving. The note underscores how the FSD rollout remains far from complete despite hardware improvements, prompting questions about realism of timelines, safety, and customer communications.
items.summary_zh: 特斯拉在经历七年的等待后，仍未向 HW3 用户交付完整自驾功能，官方让人耐心等待。此举暴露了 FSD 推广的长期性及对时间表、安全及对用户沟通的挑战。

items.title_en: Michigan 'digital age' bills pulled after privacy concerns raised
items.title_zh: 密歇根‘数字时代’法案在隐私担忧后被撤回
items.summary_en: Michigan withdraws proposed 'digital age' privacy bills after concerns from privacy advocates emphasize potential data collection and surveillance risks. The move signals a push for stronger safeguards before sweeping tech policies pass.
items.summary_zh: 密歇根州在隐私倡议者的担忧之下撤回了“数字时代”相关法案，强调潜在的数据收集与监控风险。此举显示在全面推进科技政策前需要更强的隐私与安全保障。

items.title_en: Gemini Robotics-ER 1.6
items.title_zh: Gemini Robotics-ER 1.6
items.summary_en: DeepMind releases Gemini Robotics-ER 1.6, detailing improvements to robotics and embodied AI capabilities. The update signals progress in integrating perception, control, and autonomy in real-world robots.
items.summary_zh: DeepMind 发布 Gemini Robotics-ER 1.6，介绍机器人与具身 AI 能力的改进。更新体现了在真实世界机器人中的感知、控制与自主性整合方面的进展。

items.title_en: JVM Options Explorer
items.title_zh: JVM 选项探索器
items.summary_en: A web-based explorer for Java Virtual Machine options helps developers discover and compare flags, from GC tuning to JIT and memory settings. It reduces guesswork during JVM tuning and speeds up performance experimentation.
items.summary_zh: 这是一个在线的 JVM 参数浏览器，方便开发者查找、对比各类参数及其用途，包括垃圾回收、JIT 和内存设置。能够降低调优中的试错成本，加速性能试验。

items.title_en: CRISPR takes important step toward silencing Down syndrome’s extra chromosome
items.title_zh: CRISPR 向抑制唐氏综合征多余染色体迈出重要一步
items.summary_en: Researchers report progress toward silencing the extra chromosome in Down syndrome using CRISPR-based approaches, a milestone toward potential therapies. Experts caution about off-target effects, ethics, and translation to humans.
items.summary_zh: 研究人员利用 CRISPR 等方法在抑制唐氏综合征多余染色体方面取得进展，向潜在治疗迈出里程碑式的一步。专家提醒关注脱靶效应、伦理与人类转化的挑战。

items.title_en: CadQuery is an open-source Python library for building 3D CAD models
items.title_zh: CadQuery：用于构建 3D CAD 模型的开源 Python 库
items.summary_en: CadQuery provides a Python-based API for generating parametric 3D CAD models, letting engineers script geometry instead of clicking in a GUI. Being open source, it integrates with numpy-like workflows and can speed up prototyping, automation, and reproducible design.
items.summary_zh: CadQuery 提供基于 Python 的参数化 3D CAD 建模 API，允许通过脚本生成几何形状，而非仅靠图形界面。作为开源项目，它与常用数据处理工作流易于结合，可加速原型设计、自动化和结果复现。

items.title_en: The Orange Pi 6 Plus
items.title_zh: Orange Pi 6 Plus
items.summary_en: The Orange Pi 6 Plus is a competitive entry in the evolving SBC market, offering a newer ARM CPU, improved I/O, and better multimedia support at a low price. The review weighs performance, software ecosystem, and trade-offs against rivals like Raspberry Pi.
items.summary_zh: Orange Pi 6 Plus 是在日益激烈的单板计算机市场中的有力竞争者，具备更新的 ARM CPU、改进的 I/O 和更好的多媒体支持，价格也更具吸引力。评测权衡了性能、软件生态和对比 Raspberry Pi 等对手时的取舍。

items.title_en: The End of Eleventy
items.title_zh: Eleventy 的终结
items.summary_en: The piece argues Eleventy may be losing traction as modern front-end stacks demand more dynamic, integrated tooling. It highlights tradeoffs between simplicity and capability in static-site workflows, urging teams to re-evaluate their tooling choices as ecosystems evolve. The author suggests exploring hybrid approaches or newer frameworks that offer better scalability.
items.summary_zh: 本文认为 Eleventy 在当今需要动态特性和集成工具的前端生态中可能逐渐失去吸引力。作者讨论静态站点工作流的取舍，建议团队在生态演进中重新评估工具选择，并考虑更具扩展性的混合方案或新框架。

items.title_en: Discourse Is Not Going Closed Source
items.title_zh: Discourse 不会走向闭源
items.summary_en: Discourse confirms it will stay open-source and maintains transparency around its software. The stance matters for communities relying on open platforms, potentially affecting future pricing, feature development, and governance.
items.summary_zh: Discourse 确认将继续维持开源生态，保持软件的透明度。这一立场关系到使用该平台的社区，对未来定价、功能开发及治理产生影响。

items.title_en: Artifacts: Versioned storage that speaks Git
items.title_zh: Artifacts：像 Git 一样的版本化存储
items.summary_en: Artifacts introduces Git-backed, versioned storage designed for agents to version data and collaborate, blurring lines between code and data storage.
items.summary_zh: Artifacts 推出以 Git 为底层的版本化存储，面向代理用来管理数据版本并协作，模糊了代码与数据存储的边界。

items.title_en: Laravel raised money and now injects ads directly into your agent
items.title_zh: Laravel 募资成功，如今直接向你的代理投放广告
items.summary_en: Laravel, the PHP framework, has raised funding and is pursuing monetization by injecting ads directly into your agent. This pivot highlights a broader trend of monetizing developer tooling, raising concerns about intrusion, trust, and the future of free, community-driven projects. The move could redefine expectations for open-source ecosystems where monetization intersects with user experience.
items.summary_zh: 作为 PHP 框架的 Laravel 完成融资，现通过在你的代理中投放广告来实现货币化。这一策略引发对开发者工具商业化、用户体验和隐私的担忧，并在开源生态中重新定义了货币化与信任的边界。

items.title_en: US national level OS-level age verification bill proposed
items.title_zh: 美国提出国家级操作系统级别年龄验证法案
items.summary_en: A proposed US bill would require OS-level age verification across digital platforms, raising privacy, accessibility, and compliance challenges for apps and services. It could spur changes in identity verification tech and data handling.
items.summary_zh: 拟议中的美国法案要求在操作系统层面对数字平台进行年龄验证，给应用程序和服务带来隐私、可访问性与合规方面的挑战，可能推动身份验证技术与数据处理方式的变革。

items.title_en: An AI Vibe Coding Horror Story
items.title_zh: AI 氛围下的编码恐怖故事
items.summary_en: A cautionary tale about coding with AI vibes, showing how AI-generated code can be brittle, misaligned, or surprising results. The narrator argues for careful validation and human oversight in AI-driven development.
items.summary_zh: 这是一则关于在 AI 引导下编码的恐怖故事，展示了 AI 生成的代码可能不稳定、目标偏离或带来意外结果。作者强调在 AI 驱动的开发中进行审计与人类监督的重要性。

items.title_en: Let's talk space toilets
items.title_zh: 谈谈太空厕所
items.summary_en: An exploration of space toilets, examining the challenges of microgravity and waste management on spacecraft. The discussion covers how engineering constraints shape life-support systems and the daily realities of long-duration missions.
items.summary_zh: 深入探讨太空厕所的设计与挑战，聚焦微重力下的废物管理以及与之相关的工程约束。内容揭示长期任务中生命维持系统的日常现实及其对航天工程的影响。

items.title_en: Keep Android Open
items.title_zh: 保持 Android 开放
items.summary_en: Keep Android Open argues for preserving openness and user choice in the Android ecosystem against heavy-handed restrictions. The piece outlines policy or technical proposals to keep platforms flexible and private.
items.summary_zh: Keep Android Open 主张在 Android 生态中保持开放性和用户选择，反对过度限制。文章概述了保持平台灵活性与隐私性的政策或技术建议。

items.title_en: A perfectable programming language
items.title_zh: 可完善的编程语言
items.summary_en: Explores design principles for a programming language meant to be progressively improved over time, emphasizing a minimal core, extensibility, and verifiable correctness. The piece argues for a language with a small, stable core and a pathway for community-driven extensions, balancing practicality with long-term evolvability.
items.summary_zh: 探讨一种可逐步完善的编程语言的设计原则，强调最小核心、可扩展性与可验证性。文章提出以小而稳定的核心和社区驱动的扩展为路径，兼顾实用性和长期演化。

items.title_en: It's OK to compare floating-points for equality
items.title_zh: 浮点数相等比较是可以的
items.summary_en: Argues that, in practical computation, direct equality comparisons can be acceptable when numbers are within a small tolerance or from the same computation. Explains concepts like epsilon, ulp, and rounding modes to guide when to rely on exact equality.
items.summary_zh: 在实际计算中，直接比较浮点数是否相等在某些情形是可接受的，尤其当数值来自同一运算且容忍度很小。文中介绍 epsilon、ulp 与舍入模式等概念，帮助判断何时应采用近似相等。

items.title_en: NASA Shuts Off Instrument on Voyager 1 to Keep Spacecraft Operating
items.title_zh: 为了延长 Voyager 1 的任务而关闭一台仪器
items.summary_en: As RTG power wanes, NASA shut off an instrument on Voyager 1 to conserve energy and extend the mission's life. The move illustrates the brutal reality of long-duration space exploration and prioritization of essential systems for interstellar reach.
items.summary_zh: 随着放射性同位素热源发电能力下降，NASA 关闭了 Voyager 1 的一台仪器以节省能源、延长任务寿命。这反映了长期深空探测的现实难题和对关键系统的优先级排序。

items.title_en: How to make Firefox builds 17% faster
items.title_zh: 让 Firefox 构建快 17%
items.summary_en: Firefox builds get 17% faster thanks to caching WebIDL codegen, which eliminates repeated work across incremental builds. The takeaway is to identify expensive, deterministic codegen steps and cache them to accelerate iteration in large codebases.
