items.summary_zh: 通过缓存 WebIDL 代码生成步骤，增量构建中的重复工作被消除，使 Firefox 构建快了约 17%。对于大型代码库，抓住耗时且可重复的代码生成步骤并对其进行缓存，可以显著提升迭代速度。

items.title_en: A simplified model of Fil-C
items.title_zh: Fil-C 的简化模型
items.summary_en: A compact, approachable model of Fil-C is presented, focusing on its essential dynamics and expected behaviors without drowning in details. By isolating core interactions, the piece helps readers reason about Fil-C in simulations and policy contexts. The takeaway is that simplified models can clarify design choices and potential risks.
items.summary_zh: 对 Fil-C 给出一个简化、易于理解的模型，聚焦其核心动态与预期行为，避免细枝末节。通过提炼关键交互，帮助读者在仿真与政策分析中更清晰地推演 Fil-C 的可能走向。要点在于简化模型有助于澄清设计取舍与潜在风险。

items.title_en: The creative software industry has declared war on Adobe
items.title_zh: 创意软件行业对 Adobe 的挑战
items.summary_en: Industry players are intensifying competition with more affordable, capable tools that threaten Adobe's monopoly on creative workflows. The piece surveys notable alternatives and product strategies aimed at teams and individual creators, signaling a shift toward open formats, better pricing, and interoperability.
items.summary_zh: 众多厂商通过更实惠、功能完善的工具挑战 Adobe 在创作工作流中的垄断地位。文章梳理了值得关注的替代品和产品策略，强调开源/开放格式、更友好的定价与互操作性正在成为潮流。

items.title_en: European AI. A playbook to own it
items.title_zh: 欧洲 AI：掌控它的行动指南
items.summary_en: Europe's playbook outlines strategies for building sovereign, ethical, and competitive AI ecosystems, balancing regulation with innovation. It emphasizes data governance, responsible AI, and regional leadership to reduce dependence on non-European tech stacks.
items.summary_zh: 这份行动指南提出在监管与创新之间取得平衡，打造主权、道德且具竞争力的欧洲 AI 生态系统。文中强调数据治理、负责任的 AI，以及提升区域领导力，以减少对非欧洲技术体系的依赖。

items.title_en: We gave an AI a 3 year retail lease and asked it to make a profit
items.title_zh: 我们给 AI 租了三年零售店并要求其盈利
items.summary_en: An AI was given a three-year lease on a retail space and asked to run it profitably, testing how an AI could manage a real-world storefront. The experiment probes AI planning, inventory decisions, pricing, and risk over a long horizon, with implications for AI-driven retail and proptech. The study highlights the potential and limits of AI-driven decision-making in physical retail and property management.
items.summary_zh: 该实验让 AI 获得一个为期三年的零售店租赁，并要求其实现盈利，测试 AI 在真实世界中的长期规划能力。研究关注 AI 在库存、定价、运营等多方面的决策，以及在零售和地产管理场景中的潜力与局限。

items.title_en: Direct Win32 API, weird-shaped windows, and why they mostly disappeared
items.title_zh: 直接 Win32 API、奇形窗口，以及它们为何大多已消失
items.summary_en: The article traces why direct Win32 API calls and irregular window shapes faded as Windows evolved toward safer, standardized UI. It explains security and compatibility drivers behind the shift away from quirky UI tricks. A historical look at Windows UX design decisions that influence modern OS architecture.
items.summary_zh: 文章追溯了随着 Windows 向更安全、标准化的 UI 演进，直接使用 Win32 API 和奇形窗口为何逐渐消失。解释了促成这一转变的安全性与兼容性驱动因素，并提供对现代操作系统架构有影响的历史性分析。

items.title_en: 5NF and Database Design
items.title_zh: 第5范式与数据库设计
items.summary_en: An exploration of the fifth normal form (5NF) and its implications for database design. It helps developers decide when such theoretical purity is worth the overhead.
items.summary_zh: 聚焦第五范式（5NF）及其对数据库设计的影响。文章分析在高度互联的模式中使用 5NF 的好处（消除连接异常），以及过度规范化带来的性能与维护成本，帮助开发者判断何时值得追求理论上的“纯净”性。

items.title_en: I went to America's worst national parks so you don't have to
items.title_zh: 我去过美国最差的国家公园，省你一次
items.summary_en: The author visited low-rated national parks to benchmark visitor experience, infrastructure, and access, revealing systemic underfunding and logistical challenges. The piece uses the trip to discuss how tech could help or hinder public land access.
items.summary_zh: 作者实地走访了美国口碑较差的国家公园，记录基础设施、可访问性和管理方面的挑战。通过对这些公园的观察，讨论科技如何提升或削弱公众对自然资源的访问与体验。

items.title_en: The world in which IPv6 was a good design (2017)
items.title_zh: IPv6 当初为何被视为良好设计
items.summary_en: The post argues that IPv6’s design choices—vast address space, simplified routing, and end-to-end connectivity—fit the modern Internet’s scale, even though adoption has been slow. It reflects on how IPv4-era constraints shaped design and what lessons this holds for future protocol work.
items.summary_zh: 文章认为 IPv6 的设计选择——海量地址空间、简化的路由以及端到端连接——在现代互联网的规模下是合理的，尽管普及进展缓慢。回顾了 IPv4 时代的约束如何影响设计，并探讨这些经验对未来协议设计的启示。

items.title_en: Turn your best AI prompts into one-click tools in Chrome
items.title_zh: 把你最好的 AI 提示变成 Chrome 的“一键工具"
items.summary_en: Chrome now supports turning popular AI prompts into one-click tools that run inside your browser. The feature, part of Skills in Chrome, lets developers publish prompt-driven automations that users can trigger with a single click, streamlining workflows. It signals a shift toward end-user tooling directly in the browser.
items.summary_zh: Chrome 现支持把热门 AI 提示变成浏览器内的“一键工具”。该功能属于 Chrome 的 Skills，将开发者推出的基于提示的自动化工具以单击触发，简化工作流程，标志着浏览器端直接进入 End-user tooling 的趋势。

items.title_en: Healthchecks.io now uses self-hosted object storage
items.title_zh: Healthchecks.io 现已使用自托管对象存储
items.summary_en: Healthchecks.io shifts to a self-hosted object storage backend, enabling customers to control their data and reduce reliance on public cloud. The move improves privacy, portability, and disaster-recovery options, especially for teams with strict data-residency requirements. It signals a broader trend toward self-hosted storage choices in SaaS.
items.summary_zh: Healthchecks.io 正式切换到自托管对象存储后端，允许用户掌控数据并降低对公共云的依赖。此举提升了隐私、数据可迁移性和灾备能力，尤其适合对数据留存有严格要求的团队。体现了 SaaS 越来越多地向自托管存储方案靠拢的趋势。

items.title_en: Building a SaaS in 2026 Using Only EU Infrastructure
items.title_zh: 在2026年仅使用欧盟基础设施构建SaaS
items.summary_en: Building a SaaS in 2026 using only EU infrastructure explores the feasibility of a fully EU-controlled tech stack, emphasizing data sovereignty, GDPR compliance, and interoperability. The piece notes initiatives like Gaia-X and EU cloud services as enablers, but warns that vendor lock-in and performance considerations remain challenges.
items.summary_zh: 文章探讨在2026年仅使用欧盟基础设施来搭建SaaS的可行性，强调数据主权、合规与互操作性。通过分析 Gaia-X 等欧盟云生态，提出方案虽有潜力，但也存在供应商锁定与性能等挑战。

items.title_en: Google, Microsoft, Meta All Tracking You Even When You Opt Out
items.title_zh: Google、Microsoft、Meta 即使在你选择退出后仍在追踪你
items.summary_en: An independent audit finds that Google, Microsoft, and Meta continue to track users even when opt-out preferences are set, using mechanisms like persistent identifiers and fingerprinting across services. The findings highlight the gap between user controls and actually implemented tracking, underscoring the need for stronger privacy protections.
items.summary_zh: 独立审计发现谷歌、微软、Meta 即使在用户选择退出后，仍通过持久识别符、浏览器指纹等方式追踪用户。结果凸显隐私控制与实际追踪之间的差距，强调需要更强的隐私保护与监管。

items.title_en: The Closing of the Frontier
items.title_zh: 前沿的收束：创新边界正在收缩
items.summary_en: The piece argues that the era of easy, open-ended frontier exploration is ending as regulatory, geopolitical, and funding constraints tighten the boundaries. It discusses how this shift will reshape risk-taking, investment, and innovation strategies.
items.summary_zh: 文章认为，随着监管、地缘政治和资金约束加剧，曾经容易探索的前沿正在收缩。此变动将改变风险偏好、投资方向及创新策略。

items.title_en: Show HN: Every CEO and CFO change at US public companies, live from SEC
items.title_zh: Show HN：来自 SEC 的美国上市公司 CEO 与 CFO 变动实时追踪
items.summary_en: Live-tracked updates show every CEO and CFO change at US public companies based on SEC filings, offering a real-time window into leadership turnover. The dashboard highlights how executive shifts correlate with market sentiment and corporate strategy.
items.summary_zh: 实时追踪显示美国上市公司每一次 CEO 与 CFO 的变动，基于 SEC 文件披露，提供对领导层变动的实时洞察。看板揭示高管变动与市场情绪及公司策略之间的潜在关联。

items.title_en: Claude Opus 4.7
items.title_zh: Claude Opus 4.7
items.summary_en: Anthropic releases Claude Opus 4.7, a new iteration of its high-end AI assistant with improvements in reasoning, safety, and efficiency. The release also includes model-card disclosures detailing capabilities, intended use cases, and safety considerations for enterprise deployments.
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 发布 Claude Opus 4.7，作为高阶 AI 助手的新版本，提升了推理、安全性与效率。随附的模型卡概述了能力、使用场景和企业部署时的安全注意事项，帮助用户把控应用边界。

items.title_en: US v. Heppner (S.D.N.Y. 2026) no attorney-client privilege for AI chats [pdf]
items.title_zh: 美国 v. Heppner 案（S.D.N.Y.，2026）：AI 聊天不享受律师-客户特权
items.summary_en: A New York federal court ruled that AI-generated chats do not enjoy attorney-client privilege, potentially exposing AI-mediated communications to discovery. The decision has broad implications for legal strategy, evidence handling, and the adoption of AI tools in law practices.
items.summary_zh: 纽约联邦法院裁定 AI 生成的聊天记录不享有律师-客户特权，相关信息可能在诉讼中成为证据。这一裁决对法律策略、证据处理以及在律师事务所中使用 AI 工具的前景具有广泛影响。

items.title_en: Picasso’s Guernica (Gigapixel)
items.title_zh: 毕加索《格尔尼卡》千亿像素（Gigapixel）
items.summary_en: A gigapixel viewer of Picasso's Guernica lets you zoom into brushwork, color, and composition at unprecedented detail. The exhibit blends art history with modern imaging tech to reveal new sensory dimensions.
items.summary_zh: 这是一个千亿像素的互动放大查看器，让人可以近距离观察毕加索《格尔尼卡》的笔触、调色和构图，融合艺术与现代成像技术。

items.title_en: If you started a company two years ago, many assumptions are no longer true
items.title_zh: 两年前创业者的假设如今多已不再成立
items.summary_en: The piece argues that many startup assumptions made two years ago no longer hold due to shifting funding climate, consumer behavior, and competitive pressure. Founders should re-evaluate markets, unit economics, and strategies, pivoting or sunsetting unviable plans if needed.
items.summary_zh: 两年前创业者的假设如今多已不再成立，原因包括资金环境、市场需求与竞争格局的变化。创始人应重新评估市场、单位经济与策略，必要时调整方向或退出不再可行的计划。

items.title_en: Dependency cooldowns turn you into a free-rider
items.title_zh: 依赖冷却期让你沦为免费搭便车者
items.summary_en: Dependency cooldowns can unintentionally encourage teams to become free riders, letting someone else worry about upgrades. That inertia increases risk from outdated or vulnerable libraries and complicates security and compliance. The piece argues for redesigning incentives and tooling to enforce timely upgrades and provide clear dependency lifecycles.
items.summary_zh: 依赖冷却期可能无意中让团队成为搭便车者，把升级和审查依赖的责任推给他人。如此会导致过时或易受攻击的组件长期存在，增加安全与合规风险。文章主张通过改进激励、工具和对依赖生命周期的可见性，推动及时升级和明确责任分工。

items.title_en: Show HN: I built a social media management tool in 3 weeks with Claude and Codex
items.title_zh: Show HN：用 Claude 与 Codex 在3周内打造社媒管理工具
items.summary_en: A Show HN project that builds a social media management tool in three weeks with AI copilots Claude and Codex, illustrating rapid prototyping and the tradeoffs of AI-assisted development. It highlights how LLMs can accelerate UI, scheduling, and automation tasks.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 展示了用 Claude 与 Codex 在三周内开发出一个社媒管理工具的过程，体现了 AI 辅助快速迭代的潜力与取舍。项目揭示了在前端、后端和自动化任务中，AI 对工作流程的加速作用。

items.title_en: The beginning of scarcity in AI
items.title_zh: AI 资源紧缺的开端
items.summary_en: AI compute demand is outpacing supply, signaling a coming crunch as models scale and more firms deploy. Resource constraints could slow innovation, raise costs, and push the industry toward efficiency gains or alternative architectures.
items.summary_zh: AI 计算资源的需求正在超过供给，标志着AI 计算紧缺的来临，随着模型规模扩大和更多公司落地应用，局势将更紧张。资源紧张可能放慢创新、推高成本，并促使行业寻求更高效的架构与训练方法。

items.title_en: RedSun: System user access on Win 11/10 and Server with the April 2026 Update
items.title_zh: RedSun：4月2026更新后 Windows 11/10 与 Server 的系统账户访问
items.summary_en: RedSun demonstrates a privilege-escalation path that could grant system-level access on Windows 11/10 and Windows Server after the April 2026 update. The project highlights potential security gaps and suggests mitigations for defenders.
items.summary_zh: RedSun 展示了一条可能在 2026 年 4 月更新后让系统级权限获得的提权路径，影响 Windows 11/10 与 Windows Server。该项目暴露了潜在的安全缺口，并为防守端提供了缓解思路。

items.title_en: Towards trust in Emacs
items.title_zh: 走向对 Emacs 的信任
items.summary_en: Trust in Emacs should be built on verifiable package provenance, signed updates, and reproducible configurations. The write-up outlines practical steps to audit your Emacs setup, manage package sources, and minimize supply-chain risk. Small hygiene changes can significantly reduce the editor's attack surface.
items.summary_zh: 信任 Emacs 应建立在可验证的软件来源、签名更新和可重复的配置之上。文中给出审计 Emacs 设置、管理包源、降低供应链风险的实用步骤。微小的安全与使用习惯改进就能显著降低编辑器的攻击面。

items.title_en: How Big Tech wrote secrecy into EU law to hide data centres' environmental toll
items.title_zh: 大科技公司如何利用欧盟法律隐藏数据中心的环境代价
items.summary_en: Investigative Europe reports that Big Tech exploited EU secrecy provisions to obscure data centers' environmental footprint. The piece argues the loophole undermines accountability as power consumption and cooling emissions rise.
items.summary_zh: 调查机构揭露大型科技公司利用欧盟法律中的保密条款来遮掩数据中心的环境足迹。此举削弱了监管透明度，随着用能和冷却排放上升，相关影响将更难以评估。

items.title_en: AI could be the end of the digital wave, not the next big thing
items.title_zh: 人工智能可能是数字浪潮的终结，而非下一个大趋势
items.summary_en: The author argues that AI could end the era of rapid digital wave growth by concentrating power and reducing marginal gains, prompting a rethink of strategy for tech progress and investment.
items.summary_zh: 作者认为人工智能可能终结数字浪潮的增长势头，而不是成为下一波重大创新，原因在于算力、数据和商业模式的集中化可能抑制广泛创新。文章促使读者重新审视 AI 对未来技术投资和发展的影响。

items.title_en: Modern Common Lisp with FSet
items.title_zh: FSET 下的现代 Common Lisp
items.summary_en: An introduction to Modern Common Lisp with FSET, highlighting ergonomic tooling, improved libraries, and contemporary conventions that make Lisp more approachable for modern projects. It frames FSET as a practical path for Lisp adoption today.
items.summary_zh: 介绍 FSET 的现代 Common Lisp，强调在 Lisp 表达力基础上的易用性提升、库生态与现代化约定，使 Lisp 更易被当代项目采用。

items.title_en: Saying goodbye to Agile
items.title_zh: 告别敏捷开发（Agile）
items.summary_en: A critique of Agile methodologies, arguing that rigid adherence to Agile can hinder long-term product outcomes and that teams should adopt more adaptive, outcome-focused approaches. It advocates for lightweight processes and eliminating ceremony bloat.
items.summary_zh: 对敏捷方法论的批评认为，僵化的 Agile 实践可能损害长期产品结果，团队应转向更自适应、以结果为导向的方法。呼吁简化过程，减少繁琬的仪式化活动。

items.title_en: Distributed DuckDB Instance
items.title_zh: 分布式 DuckDB 实例
items.summary_en: A distributed DuckDB instance aims to run analytical queries across multiple nodes, enabling larger-scale analytics than a single process. This direction tackles data distribution, parallel execution, and fault tolerance, signaling scalable analytics for analytics workloads.
items.summary_zh: 提出在多节点上运行 DuckDB 的分布式实例，以并行化分析查询、突破单进程的容量限制。该方向需解决数据分布、并行执行和故障恢复等挑战，代表分析型工作负载的可扩展性探索。

items.title_en: Tell HN: OpenAI silently removed Study Mode from ChatGPT
items.title_zh: Tell HN：OpenAI 未经宣布移除了 ChatGPT 的学习模式
items.summary_en: OpenAI quietly removed 'Study Mode' from ChatGPT, removing a feature many students used for focused study sessions. The change highlights how product deprecations can affect educators and learners, and raises questions about transparency in feature lifecycle decisions.
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 未经宣布就移除了 ChatGPT 的学习模式，这对依赖该模式进行高效学习的学生与教师影响明显。此举暴露了产品生命周期决策中的透明度与沟通问题。

items.title_en: Hospital at centre of child HIV outbreak caught reusing syringes in Pakistan
items.title_zh: 巴基斯坦一所处于儿童HIV暴发核心的医院被发现重复使用针头
items.summary_en: A hospital at the centre of a child HIV outbreak in Pakistan was found reusing syringes, raising concerns about infection control standards. The incident highlights weaknesses in healthcare infrastructure and the need for reliable supply chains, training, and oversight to prevent further transmissions.
items.summary_zh: 巴基斯坦一所处于儿童HIV暴发核心的医院被发现重复使用针头，引发对感染控制水平的担忧。事件暴露了医疗基础设施的薄弱、供应链和监管不力的问题，亟需改进以防止进一步传播。

items.title_en: The Bromine Chokepoint
items.title_zh: 溴资源成为全球记忆芯片生产的瓶颈
items.summary_en: Bromine is a key input in several semiconductor processes, and ongoing strife in the Middle East could disrupt its supply, potentially bottlenecking memory-chip production. The result could be higher costs and tighter supply for DRAM and flash devices, underscoring geopolitical risk in chemical supply chains. Diversification and alternative manufacturing paths become strategic levers for the industry.
items.summary_zh: 中东局势可能打断全球记忆体芯片生产对溴供应的依赖，造成产量受限与价格波动。溴在芯片制造中的关键作用使其成为脆弱的供应瓶颈。这凸显了供应多元化和替代工艺的重要性。

items.title_en: Claude Opus 4.7 Model Card
items.title_zh: Claude Opus 4.7 模型卡
items.summary_en: Anthropic publishes the Claude Opus 4.7 model card, detailing safety policies, capabilities, and deployment considerations for the new release. It helps users understand what to expect and where to be cautious with this AI.
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 发布 Claude Opus 4.7 的模型卡，详细说明新版本的安全策略、能力范围与部署注意事项，帮助用户明确期望和风险点。

items.title_en: Design and implementation of DuckDB internals
items.title_zh: DuckDB 内部设计与实现
items.summary_en: Deep dive into DuckDB's internal architecture, including storage, query execution, and vectorized processing. The write-up explains how DuckDB achieves high performance as an embedded analytics DB and the tradeoffs behind its design. Worth reading for developers building in-process analytics or database systems.
items.summary_zh: 本文深入讲解 DuckDB 的内部架构，涵盖存储结构、查询执行与向量化处理等核心设计。介绍了 DuckDB 作为嵌入式分析型数据库在性能上的取舍与实现细节，如向量化执行与快速启动的设计。对打算构建本地数据库或分析工具的开发者有借鉴意义。

items.title_en: 40% of lost calories globally are from beef, needing 33 cal of feed per 1 cal
items.title_zh: 全球热量损失的40%来自牛肉生产，饲料转化率约为33:1
items.summary_en: Beef production is highly resource-inefficient, requiring about 33 calories of feed for each 1 calorie of beef energy. The study notes that a large share of global calorie losses stems from livestock supply chains, highlighting implications for climate and food security.
items.summary_zh: 牛肉生产极为资源低效，约需33单位饲料才能产出1单位牛肉的能量。全球热量损耗的很大一部分来自牲畜供应链，凸显对气候与粮食安全的影响。

items.title_en: Show HN: Ithihāsas – a character explorer for Hindu epics, built in a few hours
items.title_zh: Show HN：Ithihāsas——用于探索印度史诗人物的快速原型
items.summary_en: Ithihāsas is a lightweight, quickly-built explorer of characters in Hindu epics. It visualizes relationships and story connections, showcasing what can be built in a few hours and serving as a prototype for narrative tools.
items.summary_zh: Ithihāsas 是一个用于探索印度史诗人物的轻量级工具，快速搭建完成。它可可视化人物关系与故事线索，展示短时间原型可以实现的功能，适合作为叙事工具的雏形。

items.title_en: Introduction to Obsidian
items.title_zh: Obsidian 入门
items.summary_en: Obsidian is a Markdown-based note app with bidirectional links and a knowledge graph. This intro covers core concepts, organizing notes, and why it shines for personal knowledge management and research workflows.
items.summary_zh: Obsidian 是一个基于 Markdown 的笔记应用，支持双向链接和知识图谱。本文介绍核心概念、笔记组织方式，以及它在个人知识管理与研究工作流中的优势。

items.title_en: The Gemini app is now on Mac
items.title_zh: Gemini 应用现已登陆 Mac
items.summary_en: Google's Gemini app is now available on macOS, enabling native AI-assisted workflows across Mac devices. The release expands cross-device continuity and signals renewed push to bring Gemini into everyday developer and user environments.
items.summary_zh: Google 的 Gemini 应用现已在 macOS 上可用，使在 Mac 设备上的原生 AI 助力工作流成为可能。此举扩展了跨设备的连续性，并标志着将 Gemini 推向日常开发与用户环境的进一步推进。

items.title_en: I made a terminal pager
items.title_zh: 我做了一个终端分页器
items.summary_en: The author built a terminal pager from scratch, delivering a lightweight tool for paging through text with a focus on speed and simplicity. The project highlights practical approaches to building fast CLIs and can inspire others to rethink how we navigate large text in terminals.
items.summary_zh: 作者从零开始实现了一个终端分页器，强调快速、简洁的文本分页与导航。该项目展示了构建高效 CLI 工具的实用思路，或许能启发对终端文本浏览体验的再设计。

items.title_en: A Tour of Oodi
items.title_zh: Oodi 图书馆之旅
items.summary_en: A tour of Oodi, Helsinki's flagship library, highlighting architecture, flexible spaces, and public services enabled by modern design. The piece offers takeaways on how libraries combine culture with digital infrastructure.
items.summary_zh: 文章带你走访赫尔辛基 Oodi 图书馆，聚焦建筑风格、灵活公共空间以及现代设计支持的数字化服务。展示图书馆如何在文化与数字基础设施之间取得平衡。

items.title_en: SPEAKE(a)R: Turn Speakers to Microphones for Fun and Profit [pdf] (2017)
items.title_zh: SPEAKE(a)R：将扬声器变成麦克风以实现乐趣与盈利（2017）
items.summary_en: Demonstrates that loudspeakers can be repurposed as microphones, enabling covert data capture via acoustic channels. The paper analyzes the hardware and signal-processing tricks that make this possible and discusses privacy and security implications for consumer devices and embedded systems.
items.summary_zh: 展示了扬声器可以被逆向用作麦克风，从而通过声学信道实现隐蔽数据获取。论文解析了实现这一方法的硬件与信号处理要点，并讨论了对消费电子和嵌入式系统的隐私与安全隐患及应对思路。

items.title_en: Fuck the cloud (2009)
items.title_zh: Fuck the Cloud（2009）
items.summary_en: A 2009 manifesto arguing for local-first computing and skepticism of cloud reliance, advocates offline-capable software. It foreshadows ongoing moves toward edge computing.
items.summary_zh: 一篇 2009 年的宣言，主张对云端的依赖保持怀疑，倡导本地优先的离线可用软件，这与当前向边缘计算和本地化架构的趋势相呼应。

items.title_en: Japan implements language proficiency requirements for certain visa applicants
items.title_zh: 日本对部分签证申请者实施日语能力要求
items.summary_en: Japan has introduced language proficiency requirements for certain visa categories, tying eligibility to JLPT levels. The move aims to improve workplace integration and communication but may raise barriers for migrants, affecting sectors facing labor shortages.
items.summary_zh: 日本对部分签证申请者设定日语能力门槛，要求达到一定 JLPT 水平。此举旨在提高职场融入和沟通，但可能增加移民申请难度，影响欠缺劳动力的行业。

items.title_en: Keep Pushing: We Get 10 More Days to Reform Section 702
items.title_zh: 继续推动：第702条改革再获10天窗口
items.summary_en: Congress has been given a 10-day extension to advance reforms to Section 702, the surveillance program governing foreign communications. Advocates warn that narrowing the program is essential to curb bulk data collection and protect civil liberties, while lawmakers debate oversight, transparency, and minimization requirements.
items.summary_zh: 国会获批再延长10天以推进对第702条款的改革，该条款涉及对外国通讯的监控。倡导者强调缩小监控范围、加强监督与数据最小化对保护公民自由至关重要，议员则在监督、透明度和最小化要求上继续辩论。

items.title_en: For the first time in the U.S., renewables generate more power than natural gas
items.title_zh: 美国首次可再生能源发电量超过天然气
items.summary_en: Renewables generate more power than natural gas for the first time in U.S. history, driven by wind and solar growth. This shift has implications for grid planning, storage needs, and the emissions trajectory as the energy mix evolves.
items.summary_zh: 美国能源结构发生历史性转变，首次可再生能源发电量超过天然气。风电和太阳能的增长推动这一变化，对电网调度、储能需求以及未来排放路径产生深远影响。

items.title_en: Hacker compromises A16Z-backed phone farm, calling them the 'antichrist'
items.title_zh: 黑客入侵了获得 A16Z 支持的手机农场，并称其为反基督
items.summary_en: A hacker breaches a phone-farm operated by a startup backed by A16Z and posts memes branding the firm as the 'antichrist', illustrating the fragility of security in device-heavy ventures. The incident underscores the need for robust endpoint protection, incident response, and media-risk awareness.
items.summary_zh: 黑客入侵了一家获得 A16Z 支持的手机农场，甚至发文称其为反基督，凸显了设备密集型项目在安全方面的脆弱性。事件强调需要强大的端点防护、快速的事件响应以及对媒体风险的警觉。

items.title_en: Turtle WoW classic server announces shutdown after Blizzard wins injunction
items.title_zh: 在暴雪胜诉禁令后 Turtle WoW 经典服务器宣布关闭
items.summary_en: Turtle WoW, a private World of Warcraft Classic server, announced shutdown after Blizzard won an injunction. The move underscores IP enforcement dynamics in the private-server space and the ongoing tension between fan-run servers and game publishers.
items.summary_zh: 在暴雪获得禁令后，Turtle WoW 经典私服宣布关闭。这凸显了私服领域在知识产权执法方面的压力，以及玩家社区与发行商之间的持续博弈。

items.title_en: Bluesky has been dealing with a DDoS attack for nearly a full day
items.title_zh: Bluesky 遭遇近一天的 DDoS 攻击
items.summary_en: Bluesky has been dealing with a DDoS attack for nearly a full day, testing its resilience and uptime promises. The incident highlights how newer social networks remain vulnerable to traffic floods and the importance of robust DDoS protection.
items.summary_zh: Bluesky 遭遇持续约一天的 DDoS 攻击，考验其平台的抗压能力和可用性。此事件凸显新兴社交网络在应对大规模流量攻击时的脆弱性以及对防护方案的需求。

items.title_en: Pretty Fish: A better mermaid diagram editor
items.title_zh: Pretty Fish：更好的 Mermaid 图表编辑器
items.summary_en: Pretty Fish offers a more polished Mermaid diagram editor with a focus on usability. It aims to improve the flow and readability of diagrams used in documentation and planning. For developers who rely on diagramming, it presents a practical upgrade to a familiar tool.
items.summary_zh: Pretty Fish 提供了一个更为精致的 Mermaid 图表编辑器，专注于易用性。它旨在提升文档与规划中图表的可读性与流程性，为依赖图表的开发者带来实用升级。

items.title_en: The secrets of the Shinkansen
items.title_zh: 新干线背后的秘密
items.summary_en: Explores the engineering breakthroughs behind Japan's Shinkansen, including dedicated tracks, signaling, safety systems, and scheduling that enable high-speed, reliable service.
items.summary_zh: 解析日本新干线背后的工程创新，如专用轨道、信号与安全系统，以及高效的调度策略，如何共同实现高速、准点与安全的运营。

items.title_en: Modern Microprocessors – A 90-Minute Guide
items.title_zh: 现代微处理器：90 分钟指南
items.summary_en: A compact, 90-minute guide to modern microprocessor architecture, covering pipelines, caches, memory hierarchies, and instruction sets for software engineers.
items.summary_zh: 这份 90 分钟速览梳理了现代微处理器的体系结构要点，包括流水线、缓存、存储层次和指令集，适合工程师快速把握核心概念。

items.title_en: A better R programming experience thanks to Tree-sitter
items.title_zh: Tree-sitter 助力提升 R 的编程体验
items.summary_en: Tree-sitter, a fast incremental parser, enables smarter syntax highlighting, code navigation, and editor tooling for R. The project demonstrates how modern parsing tech can dramatically improve the developer experience in R and data-science workflows.
items.summary_zh: Tree-sitter 作为快速增量解析器，提升了 R 的语法高亮、代码导航和编辑器工具体验。此项技术展示了现代解析能力对提升数据科学工作流中 R 开发体验的潜力。

items.title_en: Write less code, be more responsible
items.title_zh: 写更少的代码，也要更负责任
items.summary_en: Promotes minimalism in code without sacrificing correctness, arguing that fewer lines can reduce bugs and maintenance cost. The piece offers guidelines for safer APIs, clearer abstractions, and responsible design choices that improve long-term reliability.
items.summary_zh: 强调在保持正确性的前提下追求代码简洁，认为更少的代码有助于降低错误和维护成本。给出在设计 API、抽象和实现方面的实用建议，助力提升长期可靠性与可维护性。

items.title_en: Show HN: MacMind – A transformer neural network in HyperCard on a 1989 Macintosh
items.title_zh: Show HN：MacMind——在1989 年 Macintosh 的 HyperCard 上实现的 Transformer 神经网络
items.summary_en: MacMind reimagines a transformer neural network running inside HyperCard on an early Macintosh, a playful demonstration of modern ML concepts in a vintage sandbox. It showcases how far hardware and tooling have progressed and serves as a thought experiment about constraints and accessibility.
items.summary_zh: MacMind 将 Transformer 模型在 1989 年 Macintosh 的 HyperCard 环境中实现，体现了在极端受限条件下实验现代 ML 的趣味性。这一项目展示了硬件与工具链的进步，并引发对资源受限条件下算法设计与可访问性的思考。

items.title_en: GAIA – Open-source framework for building AI agents that run on local hardware
items.title_zh: GAIA 是一个在本地硬件上运行的 AI 代理的开源框架
items.summary_en: GAIA is an open-source framework for building AI agents that run offline on local hardware, enabling privacy-preserving and low-latency AI workflows. The project emphasizes modular agent composition, local computation, and interoperability with popular AI models, reducing reliance on cloud infrastructure.
items.summary_zh: GAIA 是一个在本地硬件上运行 AI 代理的开源框架，支持离线隐私保护和低延迟的 AI 工作流。项目强调模块化代理组合、本地计算，以及与主流 AI 模型的互操作性，降低对云端基础设施的依赖。

items.title_en: Sam Altman's home targeted in second attack
items.title_zh: 萨姆·奥特曼的住所再次成为袭击目标
items.summary_en: Sam Altman's home was targeted again, marking a second attack on a prominent tech leader amid heated debates over AI. The incident shines a light on security risks facing tech executives and the broader climate of harassment around high-stakes AI policy.
items.summary_zh: 萨姆·奥特曼的住所再次成为袭击目标，凸显高风险环境下科技领袖的安全与骚扰问题。在高风险的AI政策辩论中，这一事件映射出技术领袖所承受的外部压力。

items.title_en: Dad brains: How fatherhood rewires the male mind
items.title_zh: 父亲脑：父亲身份如何改变男性大脑与思维
items.summary_en: BBC Future reports on how fatherhood rewires hormonal balance, brain structure, and behavior, influencing parenting styles and decision-making. The piece hints at implications for product design, workplace policies, and family tech tools that fit evolving paternal roles.
items.summary_zh: BBC 未来刊物解读父亲身份如何改变男性的荷尔蒙水平、大脑结构和行为方式，影响育儿方式与决策。文章也对面向父亲的产品设计、工作场所政策以及家庭科技工具的适配提出思考。

items.title_en: The M×N problem of tool calling and open-source models
items.title_zh: 工具调用与开源模型的 M×N 问题
items.summary_en: Coordination of multiple tools with open-source models creates a combinatorial M×N problem, leading to maintenance, compatibility, and reliability challenges. The post offers patterns and practices for designing tool interfaces, versioning, and governance to tame the complexity.
items.summary_zh: 在 AI 代理中并用多种工具与开源模型时，会产生一个 M×N 的组合性问题，带来维护、兼容性与可靠性挑战。文中提出设计工具接口、版本控制与治理的模式和实践。

items.title_en: Zig 0.16.0 Release Notes
items.title_zh: Zig 0.16.0 发布说明
items.summary_en: Zig 0.16.0 release notes describe updates to the language and toolchain, including improved cross-compilation, build tooling, and stability enhancements.
items.summary_zh: Zig 0.16.0 发布说明公布了语言与工具链的更新，覆盖跨平台构建改进、构建工具性提升与稳定性修复。

items.title_en: Tech valuations are back to pre-AI boom levels
items.title_zh: 科技估值回到AI繁荣前的水平
items.summary_en: Tech valuations have fallen back to pre-AI-boom levels, signaling a normalization of investor sentiment after AI hype. The reset may separate hype from fundamentals, presenting risks and opportunities for investors.
items.summary_zh: 科技公司的估值已回落至AI繁荣前的水平，显示在AI 热潮之后投资者情绪回归理性。估值的回落可能将热度与基本面区分开来，给投资者带来潜在的机会与风险。

items.title_en: North American English Dialects
items.title_zh: 北美英语方言
items.summary_en: A survey of North American English dialects, featuring descriptions and audio samples that illustrate regional variation in pronunciation, vocabulary, and usage.
items.summary_zh: 北美英语方言的汇编，结合描述与音频样例，展示了各地区在发音、词汇与用法上的差异。

items.title_en: Amazon is discontinuing Kindle for PC on June 30th
items.title_zh: 亚马逊将于6月30日停止 Kindle for PC 支持
items.summary_en: Amazon will discontinue Kindle for PC on June 30, with users urged to switch to other platforms or the web reader. The move reflects a broader trend toward cross-platform access and cloud-based reading. It may prompt long-time PC users to adjust their workflows or library management.
items.summary_zh: Kindle for PC 将在6月30日停止服务，用户需转向其他平台或网页版阅读器。此举体现了向跨平台和云端阅读的趋势。预计会让长期使用 PC 的用户调整工作流和图书馆管理。

items.title_en: A Python Interpreter Written in Python
items.title_zh: 用 Python 自己实现的 Python 解释器
items.summary_en: A Python interpreter written in Python demonstrates how Python’s syntax and runtime can be modeled in a self-hosted environment. It highlights parsing, interpretation, and object model design, offering practical intuition for language implementers.
items.summary_zh: 本文展示一个用 Python 实现的 Python 解释器，提供对 Python 语法和运行时在自宿主环境中建模的直观演示。介绍了解析、解释执行与对象模型设计等核心挑战，给语言实现者带来实用的直觉与见解。

items.title_en: Teddy Roosevelt and Abraham Lincoln in the same photo (2010)
items.title_zh: 同一张照片中的西奥多·罗斯福与亚伯拉罕·林肯
items.summary_en: A photo featuring both presidents likely demonstrates historical photo manipulation and the challenges of provenance in archival imagery.
items.summary_zh: 这张同时出现罗斯福和林肯的照片展示了历史图像合成的技术，也凸显了档案材料真实性与出处追溯的挑战。它提醒人们在数字取证与元数据透明度方面需要更细致的审查。

items.title_en: Too much discussion of the XOR swap trick
items.title_zh: 关于 XOR 交换技巧的讨论过多
items.summary_en: A pointed critique argues the XOR swap trick has become over-discussed and overrated, suggesting that readability and modern compiler optimizations trump any micro-optimizations.
items.summary_zh: 对 XOR 交换技巧的讨论被认为过多且被高估，作者认为代码可读性和现代编译器优化往往比这类极小的技巧更重要。

items.title_en: FIM – Linux framebuffer image viewer
items.title_zh: FIM：Linux 帧缓冲图像查看器
items.summary_en: FIM is a lightweight Linux framebuffer image viewer that runs without X, quickly rendering common image formats directly from the frame buffer. It includes improvements over the original fbi and shines in embedded or minimal setups where a GUI is unnecessary.
items.summary_zh: FIM 是一个轻量的 Linux 帧缓冲图像查看器，可在无 X 环境下直接从帧缓冲渲染常用图像格式，响应迅速。相比原版 fbi 它有改进，适用于嵌入式或极简环境中无需 GUI 的场景。

items.title_en: Show HN: Shader Lab, like Photoshop but for shaders
items.title_zh: Show HN：Shader Lab——像 Photoshop 一样的着色器编辑器
items.summary_en: A browser-based shader editor with live preview and a familiar workflow to create and iterate shader code. The project showcases approachable tooling for graphics programmers, lowering the barrier to experiment with complex visual effects.
items.summary_zh: 这是一个基于浏览器的着色器编辑器，支持实时预览、直观的工作流，便于快速创作和调试着色器代码。该工具降低了图形程序员尝试复杂视觉效果的门槛，展示了面向一般开发者的可用性设计。

items.title_en: Introduction to spherical harmonics for graphics programmers
items.title_zh: 面向图形程序员的球面调和函数入门
items.summary_en: A pragmatic primer on spherical harmonics, covering how they enable efficient lighting, shading, and environment maps in real-time graphics. Includes approachable examples and implementation tips for game developers.
items.summary_zh: 这是面向图形程序员的球面调和函数实用入门，讲解它们如何提升实时光照、着色与环境贴图的效率，并提供易上手的示例和实现要点。

items.title_en: Show HN: LangAlpha – what if Claude Code was built for Wall Street?
items.title_zh: LangAlpha：如果 Claude Code 面向华尔街打造
items.summary_en: LangAlpha demonstrates a version of Claude Code tuned for Wall Street workloads, with prompts and routines tailored to finance tasks like data extraction, risk analysis, and automated reporting. It showcases how domain-specific LLM tooling could be used in high-stakes environments.
items.summary_zh: LangAlpha 展示了面向华尔街工作负载的 Claude Code 版本，定制了用于数据提取、风险分析与自动化报告等金融任务的提示与流程。此举凸显了领域专用的 LLM 工具在高风险场景中的潜力。

items.title_en: Guide.world: A compendium of travel guides
items.title_zh: guide.world：旅行指南大全
items.summary_en: guide.world curates a global compendium of travel guides, aggregating diverse sources into a single searchable hub. The project lowers friction for planning trips across destinations and languages, potentially challenging traditional guidebooks and travel sites.
items.summary_zh: guide.world 汇聚全球旅行指南，整合多源信息为一个可检索的中心。该项目降低了跨目的地与多语言规划的门槛，或将对传统指南书和旅行平台构成挑战。

items.title_en: Costasiella kuroshimae
items.title_zh: Costasiella kuroshimae——通过间接光合作用获取能量的动物
items.summary_en: Costasiella kuroshimae, a tiny sea slug, can perform indirect photosynthesis by keeping chloroplasts from the algae it eats. That unique kleptoplasty inspires bioenergy and synthetic biology ideas, showing how nature overlaps with energy harvesting.
items.summary_zh: Costasiella kuroshimae是一种微小海蛇，被动地通过从所吃藻类中偷取叶绿体来执行间接光合作用。这一独特的克制光合作用现象为生物能源与合成生物学提供灵感，展示了自然与能源 harvesting 的交叉。文章突显了自然世界作为工程灵感来源的显著案例。

items.title_en: Claude.ai down
items.title_zh: Claude.ai 故障
items.summary_en: Claude.ai is currently down, affecting users' ability to access the model and any integrated apps. The outage underscores the fragility of cloud-based AI services and the need for reliable incident response.
items.summary_zh: Claude.ai 目前宕机，影响用户访问模型及相关应用。此事件凸显云端 AI 服务的脆弱性，以及对更可靠故障应对的需求。

items.title_en: The simple geometry behind any road
items.title_zh: 任何道路背后的简单几何
items.summary_en: Breaks down the geometric principles governing road design, such as curvature, tangents, and alignment, and shows how simple math governs practical decisions like sightlines and safety margins. The takeaway: geometry scales from intercity highways to local streets.
items.summary_zh: 从曲率、切线到线位等，解释了道路设计背后的简单几何原理，并展示这些数学如何影响视距、安全余量等实际决策。要点在于几何概念在城市主干道和街区道路之间具有一致性。

items.title_en: Reflections on 30 years of HPC programming
items.title_zh: 关于 HPC 编程30年的反思
items.summary_en: A 30-year retrospective on HPC programming traces language evolution, parallelization strategies, and tooling. It draws lessons for today’s exascale effort and the future of scalable, high-performance software.
items.summary_zh: 这篇对高性能计算（HPC）编程三十年的回顾追踪了语言演变、并行化策略与工具链的发展，并为当下的超大规模计算和未来可扩展高性能软件提出了经验教训。

items.title_en: Not all elementary functions can be expressed with exp-minus-log
items.title_zh: 并非所有初等函数都能用 exp–log 表达
items.summary_en: A mathematical note showing limitations of representing elementary functions using the combination of exp and log with minus. It highlights the boundaries of symbolic expressiveness and may discuss constructs like elementary functions vs. special function combinations.
items.summary_zh: 这篇数学笔记展示了用 exp 和 log 的组合并相减来表达初等函数的局限性，揭示了符号表达能力的边界。内容可能涉及哪些函数不能通过这类表达式简化表示，以及对计算工具的启示。

items.title_en: PgQue: Zero-Bloat Postgres Queue
items.title_zh: PgQue：零臃肿的 PostgreSQL 队列
items.summary_en: Introducing PgQue, a lightweight PostgreSQL-backed queue with a tiny footprint designed for reliable background processing. Emphasizes simplicity, ease of use, and predictable performance for apps needing queueing.
items.summary_zh: 介绍 PgQue，一种极简且零膨胀的 PostgreSQL 队列实现，专注于可靠的后台处理。强调简洁性、易用性和可预测的性能，适合需要排队能力的应用场景。

items.title_en: Swiss authorities want to reduce dependency on Microsoft
items.title_zh: 瑞士政府欲降低对微软的依赖
items.summary_en: Swiss authorities are pursuing a strategy to reduce reliance on Microsoft for cloud and software tools across the public sector. By encouraging open-source options, local providers, and mixed-vendor ecosystems, they aim to enhance data sovereignty and resilience against single-vendor risk. The move could influence European enterprise cloud procurement and push vendors toward interoperability and privacy-focused offerings.
items.summary_zh: 瑞士政府正推动降低对微软的依赖，计划通过更多开源方案与本地云/自有部署来提升数据主权与安全性。此举可能影响欧洲企业云采购格局，促使厂商提供更好互操作性与隐私保护的解决方案。

items.title_en: Brunost: The Nynorsk Programming Language
items.title_zh: Brunost：Nynorsk 编程语言
items.summary_en: Brunost explores a programming language built around Nynorsk, probing syntax choices and tooling that support Norwegian developers. The project discusses how language of code can reflect cultural identity and practical adoption considerations.
items.summary_zh: Brunost 探讨以 Nynorsk 为基础的编程语言，研究对语言语法与工具链的选择以更好地支持挪威开发者。该项目还讨论了代码语言如何反映文化身份及实际采用的考量。

items.title_en: Fixing a monitor that goes black, off or blinks due to static electricity (2023)
items.title_zh: 修复因静电导致的显示器黑屏、熄灭或闪烁
items.summary_en: A practical guide to diagnosing and fixing monitor flicker and unexpected blackouts caused by static discharge, including grounding tips and component checks. Useful for troubleshooting hardware in everyday setups.
items.summary_zh: 实用指南，诊断并修复因静电放电引起的显示器黑屏、熄灭或闪烁问题，涵盖接地与硬件检查要点，适合日常排错。

items.title_en: Optimizing Ruby Path Methods
items.title_zh: 优化 Ruby 的 Path 方法
items.summary_en: A dive into performance tweaks for Ruby’s path-related methods, showing how small changes reduce allocations and boost throughput in IO-heavy workloads. The piece helps developers decide when to roll their own path utilities versus relying on the standard library.
items.summary_zh: 介绍 Ruby 路径相关方法的性能优化，展示如何通过微小改动减少分配并提升 IO 密集型工作负载的吞吐量。为开发者提供在自建路径工具与标准库之间的取舍指导。

items.title_en: Show HN: MDV – a Markdown superset for docs, dashboards, and slides with data
items.title_zh: Show HN: MDV — 用于文档、仪表板和包含数据的幻灯片的 Markdown 超集
items.summary_en: MDV adds data-aware blocks to Markdown to support docs, dashboards, and data-driven slides, making content both readable and runnable. It aims to unify authoring and presentation for data-heavy work, with tooling to render outputs as dashboards or slide decks. This could streamline workflows for engineers and data scientists.
items.summary_zh: MDV 将 Markdown 扩展为支持文档、仪表板与数据驱动幻灯片的工具，数据块让文档与展示更紧密结合。旨在为数据科学家和开发者提供统一的写作-呈现工作流，并能直接渲染为仪表板或幻灯片。

items.title_en: The Physics of GPS
items.title_zh: GPS 的物理原理
items.summary_en: Explains how GPS works, including relativistic corrections and signal timing, and shows how geometry and timing enable precise positioning.
items.summary_zh: 详细解释 GPS 的工作原理，涵盖相对论修正、信号时序，以及几何与时钟同步如何实现高精度定位。

items.title_en: Nanopass Framework: Clean Compiler Creation Language
items.title_zh: Nanopass 框架：干净的编译器创建语言
items.summary_en: Nanopass provides a modular, low-friction approach to writing compilers by composing passes. It emphasizes separation of concerns, enabling easier reasoning about correctness and transformations, and has influenced language tooling design by making compiler pipelines more approachable.
items.summary_zh: Nanopass 通过将编译过程拆分为可组合的阶段，提供模块化、低耦合的编译器构建方式。它强调职责分离，便于验证正确性并简化变换逻辑，对语言工具链设计产生了持续影响。

items.title_en: AI ruling prompts warnings from US lawyers: Your chats could be used against you
items.title_zh: AI 判决引发美国律师警示：你的聊天记录可能被用于起诉
items.summary_en: The ruling prompts lawyers to caution clients about what they share with AI tools, as chats could be discoverable. Law firms are pushing for data hygiene practices and privacy-aware workflows when using AI. The article underscores AI's impact on legal strategy and client counsel.
items.summary_zh: 判决促使律师提醒客户在使用人工智能工具时谨慎分享信息，因为聊天记录可能成为证据。律师事务所正在推动数据清理与隐私友好工作流程，确保在使用 AI 时的合规性。此事凸显AI对法律策略和客户咨询的影响。

items.title_en: A Brief History of Fish Sauce
items.title_zh: 鱼露的简史
items.summary_en: A concise tour of fish sauce's history, from ancient fermentation to modern industrial production. Regional methods and long aging times built a globally distributed condiment that underpins Southeast Asian cuisine and today’s flavor economics.
items.summary_zh: 鱼露从古代发酵到现代工业化生产的简要演变。文章梳理了区域做法和漫长熟成如何让这一调味品走向全球，并影响了亚洲菜肴的风味与贸易格局。

items.title_en: Tracking down a 25% Regression on LLVM RISC-V
items.title_zh: 在 LLVM 的 RISC-V 上追踪 25% 的回归
items.summary_en: A developer tracks a substantial performance regression (~25%) in LLVM's RISC-V backend, outlining steps like narrowing optimization passes, inspecting code generation, and validating with benchmarks. The work illustrates the fragility of compiler backends and the value of regression testing.
items.summary_zh: 开发者追踪了 LLVM RISC-V 后端的显著性能回归（约 25%），描述了收缩优化阶段、检查代码生成以及回归基准测试等定位步骤。这一工作凸显了编译器后端的脆弱性以及回归测试的重要性。

items.title_en: Air Powered Segment Display? [video]
items.title_zh: 空气驱动的分段显示？[视频]
items.summary_en: Shows a novel air-powered segmented display prototype, illustrating a playful approach to actuation and typography. The video demonstrates low-power, ambient motion as an alternative to motorized displays and invites discussion on hardware prototyping tradeoffs.
items.summary_zh: 展示了一种新颖的空气驱动分段显示原型，展示了驱动与排版的有趣结合。该视频展示了低功耗、环境友好的驱动方式，探讨了与电机驱动显示相比的权衡。

items.title_en: Introducing: ShaderPad
items.title_zh: ShaderPad 介绍
items.summary_en: ShaderPad introduces a lightweight environment for writing and testing GPU shaders with immediate feedback. It streamlines iteration, debugging, and profiling of GLSL/HLSL-style code. Takeaway: a developer-friendly scratchpad can speed up shader engineering.
items.summary_zh: ShaderPad 提供一个轻量级的着色器开发环境，支持快速编写和测试 GPU 着色器并获得即时反馈。它简化了 GLSL/HLSL 风格代码的迭代、调试与分析。核心价值在于为开发者提供一个友好的“草稿板”以提升着色器开发效率。

items.title_en: Franklin's bad ads for Apple II clones and the beloved impersonator they depict
items.title_zh: 弗兰克林广告下的 Apple II 克隆机与被模仿者的形象
items.summary_en: An examination of Franklin's marketing for Apple II clones and the personas the campaigns used, highlighting how early clone marketing shaped public perception of the hardware. The piece reflects on nostalgia, branding tricks, and the broader culture of 1980s computing.
items.summary_zh: 本文回顾弗兰克林对 Apple II 克隆机的早期广告及其塑造的形象，指出这类营销如何影响公众对这类硬件的认知。文中探讨了怀旧情感、品牌策略，以及 1980 年代计算机文化的整体氛围。

items.title_en: How long-distance couples use digital games to facilitate intimacy (2025)
items.title_zh: 研究远距离情侣如何通过电子游戏增进亲密感
items.summary_en: The study documents how couples in long-distance relationships use digital games to maintain closeness, shaping interactions, intimacy, and relationship satisfaction. It offers takeaways for designers of social games and remote communication tools.
items.summary_zh: 研究记录了远距离情侣如何通过数字游戏维持情感亲密，影响互动模式、情感表达与关系满意度。研究结果对社交游戏设计和远程沟通工具的发展提供了可转化的洞察。

items.title_en: Show HN: Libretto – Making AI browser automations deterministic
items.title_zh: Show HN: Libretto – 让 AI 浏览器自动化变得确定性
items.summary_en: Libretto makes AI-driven browser automation deterministic, improving reliability and debuggability for automation tasks. It helps reproduce results across runs, reducing flaky behaviors.
items.summary_zh: Libretto 让 AI 驱动的浏览器自动化变得确定、可重复，提升自动化任务的可靠性与可调试性。它有助于在多次运行中重现结果，减少不稳定现象。

items.title_en: Experiment with ICEYE Open Data
items.title_zh: ICEYE 开放数据计划
items.summary_en: ICEYE's open data initiative releases satellite radar imagery to researchers and developers. It lowers barriers to building geospatial tools and experiments. At the same time, licensing, privacy, and potential misuse remain considerations for users.
items.summary_zh: ICEYE 的开放数据计划向研究人员和开发者发布卫星雷达影像。它降低了构建地理空间工具和进行实验的门槛。与此同时，许可、隐私和潜在滥用等问题也需要关注。

items.title_en: I built a 3D printing business and ran it for 8 months
items.title_zh: 我建立了一个3D打印生意并运营了8个月
items.summary_en: An eight-month narrative of starting and running a 3D printing service business. It covers revenues, operations, tooling decisions, and lessons learned about demand, margins, and fulfillment. Takeaway: practical guidance for makers turning hobby printing into a small business.
items.summary_zh: 作者讲述从零开始经营一个 3D 打印服务并持续经营了 8 个月的经历，涉及收入、运营、设备选择及对需求、毛利和交付的经验教训。给出将爱好转化为小规模生意的实用建议。

items.title_en: Show HN: SPICE simulation → oscilloscope → verification with Claude Code
items.title_zh: Show HN: Spice 仿真 → 示波器 → 使用 Claude Code 验证
items.summary_en: A post demonstrates an end-to-end verification flow: run a SPICE simulation, measure the same circuit on an oscilloscope, and validate results with Claude Code. This illustrates how AI-assisted tooling can streamline hardware validation and catch discrepancies early.
items.summary_zh: 一个展示端到端验证流程的帖子：先用 SPICE 仿真，再用示波器测量同一电路，最后用 Claude Code 进行结果验证。这体现了 AI 辅助工具在硬件验证中的潜力，能帮助更早发现不一致。

items.title_en: PHP 8.6 Closure Optimizations
items.title_zh: PHP 8.6 闭包优化
items.summary_en: RFC proposes optimizations for PHP closures, reducing allocation overhead and improving call performance, with expected runtime benefits.
items.summary_zh: 该 RFC 提出对 PHP 闭包的优化，降低分配开销并提升调用性能，预期带来运行时提升。

items.title_en: Retrofitting JIT Compilers into C Interpreters
items.title_zh: 将 JIT 编译器接入到 C 解释器中
items.summary_en: It offers concrete patterns for embedding dynamic code generation in an existing interpreter.
items.summary_zh: 文中讨论如何将 JIT 编译器集成到 C 解释器中，分析了速度、内存和可移植性等权衡，给出将动态代码生成功能嵌入现有解释器的具体模式。

items.title_en: Show HN: Run TRELLIS.2 Image-to-3D generation natively on Apple Silicon
items.title_zh: Show HN：在 Apple Silicon 上原生运行 TRELLIS.2 的图像转3D 生成
items.summary_en: TRELLIS.2 enables image-to-3D generation, and this build runs natively on Apple Silicon, suggesting optimized performance for Macs with M-series chips. This lowers hardware barriers for offline, on-device AI content creation and could influence Mac-focused AI tooling.
items.summary_zh: TRELLIS.2 实现图像到3D 的生成，且在 Apple Silicon 上实现原生运行，表现在对 M1/M2 的优化能显著提升速度与离线工作能力。此举降低了对高端云算力的依赖，利于本地创作和跨平台工具链的开发。

items.title_en: Doom, Played over Curl
items.title_zh: Curl 上的 Doom：用 Curl 玩 Doom
items.summary_en: A playful project runs Doom using curl-based tooling, demonstrating creative use of everyday CLI utilities as a game-like experience. It showcases how far developers can push tooling boundaries and what counts as interactive programming.
items.summary_zh: 一个有趣的项目用 curl 构建的工作流来运行 Doom，展示了用常见 CLI 工具打造游戏体验的创造力与边界扩展。

items.title_en: Landmark ancient-genome study shows surprise acceleration of human evolution
items.title_zh: 里程碑式的古基因组研究揭示人类进化的意外加速
items.summary_en: A landmark ancient-genome study reveals that human evolution accelerated more than previously thought. By analyzing multiple ancient genomes, researchers infer shifts in selection and population dynamics over time. The finding reshapes timelines of migration and adaptation.
items.summary_zh: 这项里程碑式的古基因组研究显示，人类进化的速度比此前预期更快。通过分析多份古代基因组，研究者推断出选择压力和种群动态随时间的变化。该发现重塑了迁徙与适应的时间线。

items.title_en: Show HN: Stage – Putting humans back in control of code review
items.title_zh: Show HN：Stage——把人类重新掌控代码评审
items.summary_en: Stage offers a human-in-the-loop approach to code review, aiming to keep humans in charge of critical decisions amid automation. It highlights collaboration workflows where AI suggestions are reviewed and corrected by developers, reducing over-reliance on automated tooling.
items.summary_zh: Stage 提供了一套将人类纳入代码评审流程的解决方案，确保在自动化建议之上仍由开发者做出关键决策。它展示了 AI 建议需经人工审阅和修正的协作工作流，降低对自动化工具的过度信任。

items.title_en: Scientists discover “cleaner ants” that groom giant ants in Arizona desert
items.title_zh: 科学家发现会梳理大型蚂蚁的‘清洁蚁’（在亚利桑那沙漠）
items.summary_en: Researchers describe a behavior where ants groom larger conspecifics, effectively acting as a cleaning service within the colony. The grooming likely reduces parasite load and reveals new aspects of social immunity in ants. This finding enriches understanding of mutualistic roles in insect ecosystems.
items.summary_zh: 研究者在亚利桑那沙漠观测到会为大型同种蚂蚁清洁梳理的行为，像在蚁群中提供卫生服务。该举动可能降低寄生虫负担，揭示蚂蚁社会免疫与群落互动的新维度。

items.title_en: Metro stop is Ancient Rome's new attraction
items.title_zh: 地铁站成了古罗马的新景点
items.summary_en: A Rome metro stop doubles as an archaeological site, revealing an ancient Roman era artifact. The ancient remains become a new attraction for travelers, integrating heritage with modern transit. It highlights how urban infrastructure projects can unlock surprising historical gems.
items.summary_zh: 罗马某地铁站兼具考古遗址属性，发掘出古罗马时期的遗存。此遗址成为游客新景点，将历史遗产与现代交通融合在一起，显示出城市基础设施工程也能挖掘出意想不到的历史宝藏。

items.title_en: 80386 Memory Pipeline
items.title_zh: 80386 内存流水线
items.summary_en: A technical look at how the 80386 memory subsystem handles caching, prefetching, and bandwidth. It sheds light on the era's architectural choices for memory performance and how constraints shaped processor throughput. The piece blends historical detail with lessons for modern memory hierarchy design.
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章详细解读了80386处理器的内存子系统如何处理缓存、预取和流水线阶段。揭示早期超标量CPU的架构设计，以及内存带宽约束如何塑造性能。

items.title_en: Multi-Agentic Software Development Is a Distributed Systems Problem
items.title_zh: 多代理软件开发本质是分布式系统问题
items.summary_en: Software development involving multiple agents (LLMs) is fundamentally a distributed systems challenge. It discusses coordination, consistency, and observability, proposing patterns like distributed logs and orchestration to enable scalable collaboration.
items.summary_zh: 提出多代理软件开发本质上是一个分布式系统问题，涉及协作、一致性、观测与调度等挑战。给出通过分布式日志、编排等模式来实现跨代理协作的思路。

items.title_en: They See Your Photos
items.title_zh: 他们能看到你的照片
items.summary_en: An examination or project about how photos are scanned or analyzed by services, devices, or apps, raising privacy concerns and practical steps to protect image data.
items.summary_zh: 聚焦照片在云端、设备或应用中被扫描和分析的机制，提出隐私风险与保护影像数据的实际建议。

items.title_en: Zero-Copy GPU Inference from WebAssembly on Apple Silicon
items.title_zh: 在 Apple Silicon 上通过 WebAssembly 实现零拷贝 GPU 推理
items.summary_en: A demonstration of zero-copy GPU inference by sharing memory between WebAssembly and the GPU on Apple Silicon, reducing data transfer bottlenecks. It suggests practical paths to accelerate ML workloads in WASM-enabled runtimes and edge devices.
items.summary_zh: 展示了在 Apple Silicon 上，WebAssembly 与 GPU 之间共享内存实现零拷贝推理，降低数据传输瓶颈。为 WASM 运行环境中的机器学习工作负载和边缘设备带来加速的可行思路。

items.title_en: Scan your website to see how ready it is for AI agents
items.title_zh: 扫描你的网站，看看它对 AI 代理的就绪程度
items.summary_en: Asset checks help you gauge whether a site is ready for AI agents, flagging data sensitivities, API dependencies, and deployment risks. The scan translates complex readiness questions into actionable guidance for teams planning AI integrations. It can help prevent data leaks and policy violations as AI use scales.
items.summary_zh: 此站点的就绪检测工具可评估你的网站是否适合让 AI 代理使用，标记数据敏感性、API 依赖与部署风险。它把复杂的就绪问题转化为可执行的指导，帮助团队在落地 AI 集成时避免数据泄露与合规问题。

items.title_en: Updating Gun Rocket through 10 years of Unity Engine
items.title_zh: Gun Rocket 在十年 Unity 引擎演进中的更新
items.summary_en: A developer documents updating the game Gun Rocket across a decade of Unity engine changes, noting API migrations, performance tweaks, and architectural shifts. The piece extracts lessons for maintaining long-lived Unity projects amid evolving tooling and platforms.
items.summary_zh: 作者记录了 Gun Rocket 在十年 Unity 引擎演进中的更新历程，梳理了 API 演进、性能调整和架构变更。为持续运营的 Unity 项目提供在工具链不断变化中维持长期开发的经验教训。

items.title_en: Notes from the SF peptide scene
items.title_zh: 来自旧金山肽领域的笔记
items.summary_en: A snapshot of the San Francisco peptide scene, covering local research, biotech startups, and culture surrounding peptide synthesis and therapeutics. It highlights community events, research trends, and the practical challenges of translating peptide science into clinics.
items.summary_zh: 这组笔记聚焦旧金山肽领域的研究进展、创业公司与科研文化，覆盖肽合成与治疗领域的最新趋势与社区活动。讨论将肽科学转化为临床应用所面临的实际挑战。

items.title_en: We reproduced Anthropic's Mythos findings with public models
items.title_zh: 我们用公开模型复现了 Anthropic 的 Mythos 发现
items.summary_en: Researchers reproduced Anthropic's Mythos findings using public models, indicating the results don't require proprietary models. This has implications for evaluating AI agents and safety claims using open resources. It underscores the importance of transparency in evaluation benchmarks.
items.summary_zh: 使用公开模型复现实验结果表明，Anthropic 的 Mythos 发现并不依赖专有模型也能观察到类似行为。此举促使人们重新审视用开放资源测试和验证 AI 代理及安全主张的方式，并强调评估基准的透明性。

items.title_en: The GNU libc atanh is correctly rounded
items.title_zh: GNU libc 的 atanh 函数实现正确舍入
items.summary_en: A discussion showing that the GNU C library's atanh implementation is correctly rounded, addressing numeric accuracy concerns in math libraries and implications for numerical software relying on precise IEEE-754 results. The takeaway: even foundational libraries get scrutinized for edge-case correctness.
items.summary_zh: 讨论显示 GNU C 库中的 atanh 实现是正确舍入的，聚焦数学库的数值精度以及对依赖精确 IEEE-754 浮点结果的数值软件的影响。要点在于连基础库也会对边界情况进行严格审查。

items.title_en: New Orleans's Car-Crash Conspiracy
items.title_zh: 新奥尔良的车祸阴谋论
items.summary_en: The New Yorker piece investigates a car crash conspiracy in New Orleans, tracing misinformation patterns, narrative construction, and potential misreporting. It sheds light on how digital media can shape public perception around a tragedy.
items.summary_zh: 本文深入调查新奥尔良的一起车祸阴谋论，追踪信息传播、叙事建构及报道中的偏差，揭示数字媒体如何左右公众对事件的看法。

items.title_en: Tax Wrapped 2025
items.title_zh: Tax Wrapped 2025：2025 年税务指南
items.summary_en: Tax Wrapped 2025 provides guidance and tooling for tax planning in 2025.
items.summary_zh: Tax Wrapped 2025 提供 2025 年税务规划的指南与工具。

items.title_en: Optimization of 32-bit Unsigned Division by Constants on 64-bit Targets
items.title_zh: 在64位目标上对32位无符号常数除法的优化
items.summary_en: Proposes an optimization strategy for performing 32-bit unsigned division by constants on 64-bit targets, using precomputed multipliers and shifts to replace costly division instructions. The technique can help compilers generate faster code for numeric-heavy workloads.
items.summary_zh: 提出在64位目标上将32位无符号常数除法替换为乘法因子和位移的优化方法，避免昂贵的除法指令。该技巧有助于编译器生成对数值密集型负载更高效的代码。

items.title_en: An Interview with Pat Gelsinger
items.title_zh: 帕特·盖尔辛格访谈
items.summary_en: Pat Gelsinger shares Intel's strategic outlook on AI workloads, manufacturing, and IDM 2.0, providing candid perspectives on the road ahead for semiconductors. The interview sheds light on how Intel plans to compete in a rapidly evolving chip ecosystem.
items.summary_zh: 帕特·盖尔辛格在访谈中谈及英特尔在 AI 工作负载、制造业和 IDM 2.0 的战略展望，提供对半导体行业快速演变格局的直观洞见。

items.title_en: Show HN: Faceoff – A terminal UI for following NHL games
items.title_zh: Show HN: Faceoff — 跟踪 NHL 比赛的终端界面
items.summary_en: Faceoff is a terminal UI that lets fans follow NHL games from the command line. It emphasizes lightweight, real-time updates and keyboard-centric navigation, appealing to power users who prefer terminal workflows over web dashboards. The project illustrates how hobby CLIs can compete with polished GUI apps for niche needs.
items.summary_zh: Faceoff 是一个在终端跟踪 NHL 比赛的界面，提供实时更新和以键盘为中心的导航，面向偏好命令行工作流的用户。它展示了爱好者级 CLI 也能在小众场景与成熟 GUI 应用竞争。

items.title_en: Human Accelerated Region 1
items.title_zh: 人类快速进化区域 HAR1
items.summary_en: HAR1 is a regulatory region showing accelerated evolution in humans versus other species, with potential roles in brain development and gene regulation. It illustrates how specific noncoding elements may contribute to human-specific traits, while proving challenging to link sequence changes to function.
items.summary_zh: HAR1 是一个在人类中进化速率显著加快的调控区域，与其他物种相比存在差异，可能在大脑发育与基因调控中发挥作用。文章阐明了非编码元件如何可能促成与人类特征相关的改变，同时将序列变异与功能之间的联系挑战性。

items.title_en: PiCore - Raspberry Pi Port of Tiny Core Linux
items.title_zh: PiCore——Tiny Core Linux 在 Raspberry Pi 上的移植
items.summary_en: PiCore delivers the ultra-light Tiny Core Linux to Raspberry Pi, prioritizing a tiny footprint and modularity for embedded projects. It suits rapid prototyping, recovery, or minimal-OS environments, offering fast boot times and a small attack surface at the cost of a steeper learning curve.
items.summary_zh: PiCore 將極致輕量的 Tiny Core Linux 帶到 Raspberry Pi。以最小化佔用、模組化設計為核心，適合嵌入式專案、快速原型或救援工具。開機速度極快、攻擊面較小，但對新手而言安裝與使用可能較為挑戰。

items.title_en: B-trees and database indexes (2024)
items.title_zh: B 树与数据库索引（2024）
items.summary_en: The article explains B-trees and indexing strategies, likely comparing traditional B-trees vs newer structures in 2024; it discusses why proper indexing matters for query performance and how to choose between B-trees, B+ trees, and other indexes; maybe covers caching and statistics.
items.summary_zh: 文章讲解 B 树与数据库索引的原理与实现，比较 2024 年的更新与优化，强调正确的索引选择对查询性能的影响，并介绍在实际场景中如何权衡不同实现。

items.title_en: Show HN: Claudraband – Claude Code for the Power User
items.title_zh: Show HN：Claudraband——面向高级用户的 Claude 编码工具
items.summary_en: Show HN about Claudraband, a project enabling advanced users to leverage Claude's coding capabilities; features may include faster prompts, templates, or CLI workflows.
items.summary_zh: Claudraband 是一个让高级用户更高效利用 Claude 的编码工具集，提供改进的界面或工作流以加速编码、测试与部署。面向 power users 的能力扩展体现了对大语言模型在专业场景中可用性的追求。

items.title_en: Fuzix OS
items.title_zh: Fuzix 操作系统
items.summary_en: Fuzix OS is a tiny Unix-like operating system designed for small devices and retro hardware, emphasizing simplicity and portability. It targets 8- and 16-bit architectures with a POSIX-like userland, enabling hobbyist projects and lightweight embedded uses. The project blends nostalgic hardware tinkering with modern software design.
items.summary_zh: Fuzix OS 是面向小型设备和复古硬件的类 Unix 操作系统，强调简单性与可移植性。目标架构包括8/16位，提供类似 POSIX 的特性，适合爱好者与嵌入式开发使用。

items.title_en: Understanding Clojure's Persistent Vectors, pt. 1 (2013)
items.title_zh: 理解 Clojure 的持久向量，第一部分（2013）
items.summary_en: A primer on Clojure's immutable vectors, describing how a 32-ary tree with structural sharing underpins efficient updates and appends. It lays the groundwork for understanding performance characteristics of persistent vectors in functional programming.
items.summary_zh: 阐释 Clojure 如何用结构共享的32叉树实现不可变向量，讲解更新、追加等操作的高效性。为理解函数式编程中持久向量的性能特性打下基础。

items.title_en: Average is all you need
items.title_zh: 平均值才是你需要的一切
items.summary_en: A provocative piece argues that simple averaging can be a surprisingly effective baseline, challenging the obsession with ever-more-complex models.
items.summary_zh: 一篇发人深省的文章主张简单的平均值作为基线竟然可以非常有效，挑战了对日益复杂模型的迷恋。

items.title_en: Understanding the FFT Algorithm (2013)
items.title_zh: 理解快速傅里叶变换（FFT）算法（2013）
items.summary_en: A pedagogical post explaining FFT basics, including how DFT is transformed into efficient divide-and-conquer, and practical tips for implementing FFT in code. It offers intuition about windowing, complexity, and numerical stability. A good refresher for students and developers alike.
items.summary_zh: 这篇教程性文章讲解快速傅里叶变换（FFT）的原理与实现要点，涵盖将离散傅里叶变换转化为高效的分治算法，以及代码实现中的数值稳定性与窗函数等实用要点。

items.title_en: NimConf 2026: Dates Announced, Registrations Open
items.title_zh: NimConf 2026：日期公布，注册开启
items.summary_en: NimConf 2026 has announced dates and opened registrations, signaling growing interest in the Nim programming language. The event will feature talks on language design, tooling, and performance from the Nim community. It’s a barometer of Nim’s maturation and community activity.
items.summary_zh: NimConf 2026 已公布日期并开启注册，显示 Nim 语言社区的持续热度。大会将聚焦语言设计、工具链与性能方面的进展，并邀请社区开发者分享最新成果。

items.title_en: Why is IPv6 so complicated?
items.title_zh: 为什么 IPv6 这么复杂？
items.summary_en: The post digs into why IPv6 is so complex, from its rich feature set to addressing schemes and deployment pitfalls. It connects design choices to real-world engineering challenges faced by operators. The takeaways help network teams navigate IPv6 adoption more pragmatically.
items.summary_zh: 文章深入探讨了 IPv6 为什么如此复杂，从丰富的特性集到寻址方案和部署难点。将设计选择与运营者在实际工作中遇到的挑战联系起来，提供了更务实的 IPv6 推广要点。

items.title_en: Connie Converse was a folk-music genius. Then she vanished
items.title_zh: 康妮·康贝斯（Connie Converse）：民谣天才，后突然消失
items.summary_en: BBC Culture profiles Connie Converse, an influential early folk-music artist whose career faded after she vanished in the 20th century. Rediscovered recordings and scholarship position her as a precursor to indie folk, reshaping how we understand her influence and a musician's archival mystery.
items.summary_zh: BBC Culture 回顾了 Connie Converse，这位早期民谣音乐人的重要影响力在她于20世纪消失后逐渐淡出。通过重新发现的录音和学界研究，她被视为独立民谣的先驱，这一故事重新塑造了人们对她影响力与艺术家档案之谜的理解。

items.title_en: Kalshi CEO expects US DOJ to prosecute insider trading cases
items.title_zh: Kalshi 的 CEO 预计 DOJ 将起诉内幕交易案件
items.summary_en: Kalshi's CEO predicts DOJ prosecutions for insider trading, signaling tougher enforcement for markets and prediction platforms alike. If borne out, it could raise compliance bars and reshape how operators govern access and information.
items.summary_zh: Kalshi 的 CEO 预测 DOJ 将起诉内幕交易案件，标志着对市场及预测平台的执法将趋严。若成真，可能提高合规门槛并影响运营方对信息披露与治理的要求。

items.title_en: My adventure in designing API keys
items.title_zh: 设计 API 密钥的历程
items.summary_en: Designing API keys involves balancing security, usability, and governance. The author's experiences cover scoping, rotation, revocation, and abuse prevention—lessons useful for anyone building APIs.
items.summary_zh: 分享在设计 API 密钥过程中的权衡与风险，涵盖作用域、轮换与撤销等方面的考量，以及如何防止滥用。为构建 API 的开发者提供可操作的经验教训。

items.title_en: Rust Threads on the GPU
items.title_zh: Rust 线程在 GPU 上
items.summary_en: It discusses feasibility, trade-offs, and the future of Rust-based parallelism on graphics hardware.
items.summary_zh: 讨论在 GPU 上实现 Rust 风格的并发线程，探索对 GPU 加速工作负载的潜在提升与风险。分析将 Rust 的安全性与并行性应用于显卡硬件的可行性与未来方向。

items.title_en: Gas Town: From Clown Show to v1.0
items.title_zh: Gas Town：从小丑秀到 v1.0
items.summary_en: A candid retrospective recounts Gas Town's journey from chaotic launch to a stable v1.0, sharing lessons about release practices, tooling, and team dynamics. The piece offers takeaways on shipping reliability in ambitious tech projects.
items.summary_zh: 回顾性文章记录 Gas Town 从混乱上线到版本1.0的蜕变，分享发布流程、工具与团队协作方面的经验教训。为高强度的技术项目在交付稳定性方面提供借鉴。

items.title_en: Who's Been Impersonating This ProPublica Reporter?
items.title_zh: 谁在冒充这位 ProPublica 的记者？
items.summary_en: ProPublica reports a ProPublica reporter's identity was spoofed by someone impersonating them to mislead sources or spread misinformation. The incident underscores the growing threat of media impersonation and the need for verification workflows and journalist identity protections.
items.summary_zh: ProPublica 警告称有人冒充该记者身份，以误导消息源或散布不实信息。事件凸显了媒体身份冒充的日益严重，需要加强身份验证流程和记者安全保护。

items.title_en: Graphs that explain the state of AI in 2026
items.title_zh: 解释2026年 AI 状态的图表
items.summary_en: IEEE Spectrum presents a visual snapshot of AI in 2026—compute, investment, deployment, and policy trends. The charts reveal where hype outpaces real capability and highlight gaps between research progress and production systems. The data helps readers gauge the tech's trajectory and policy implications.
items.summary_zh: IEEE Spectrum 的一组图表揭示2026年AI在算力、投资、落地与政策趋势。图示凸显热度与实际能力之间的差距，并指向政府与企业的关注重点及潜在风险。

items.title_en: 2,100 Swiss municipalities showing which provider handles their official email
items.title_zh: 2100 个瑞士自治市政体公开官方邮箱提供商
items.summary_en: A dataset showing which providers manage official emails for Swiss municipalities, highlighting security, sovereignty, and procurement fragmentation. It sheds light on public-sector cloud dependencies.
items.summary_zh: 这份数据集揭示了瑞士两千多自治市在官方邮箱服务商方面的选择及分布，反映出采购分散、云服务依赖及安全治理的挑战。对公共部门的信息安全、合规和供应商锁定具有重要意义。

items.title_en: Ohio prison inmates 'built computers and hid them in ceiling' (2017)
items.title_zh: Ohio 监狱囚犯“在天花板藏匿电脑” (2017)
items.summary_en: A report on inmates who constructed clandestine computers and concealed them in ceilings, illustrating security risks and inventive smuggling within prisons. It highlights the challenges of monitoring contraband tech.
items.summary_zh: 报道讲述囚犯秘密组装电脑并藏于天花板，揭示监狱中的安全风险与对走私科技的应对挑战。

items.title_en: The looming college-enrollment death spiral
items.title_zh: 日益逼近的高校入学人数下降危机
items.summary_en: The Atlantic piece analyzes demographic shifts and higher education enrollment declines, discussing implications for universities, student debt, and regional economies; it warns about long-term sustainability and the need for policy adaptation.
items.summary_zh: 文章分析人口结构变化导致的高等教育入学率下降及其对大学、学生债务和地区经济的冲击，呼吁政策层面的对策和长期可持续性思考。

items.title_en: GPT‑Rosalind for life sciences research
items.title_zh: GPT-Rosalind：面向生命科学研究的 AI 助手
items.summary_en: GPT-Rosalind extends specialized AI to life sciences research, offering domain-tailored reasoning and data analysis to help researchers interpret biological data and run experiments more efficiently. It signals growing AI tooling for scientific workflows.
items.summary_zh: GPT-Rosalind 将专门为生命科学研究定制的 AI 能力引入研究工作流，帮助研究者分析数据、解释结果并提升实验效率，体现科研领域 AI 工具的日益增长。

items.title_en: Fast and Easy Levenshtein distance using a Trie (2011)
items.title_zh: 使用 Trie 的快速 Levenshtein 距离（2011）
items.summary_en: A 2011 post demonstrates a fast Levenshtein distance computation using a Trie, offering a practical optimization for approximate string matching in large datasets.
items.summary_zh: 一篇 2011 年的博文展示如何用 Trie 快速计算 Levenshtein 距离，为大规模字符串匹配提供实用的性能优化思路。

items.title_en: Show HN: Prompt-to-Excalidraw demo with Gemma 4 E2B in the browser (3.1GB)
items.title_zh: Show HN：Prompt 转 Excalidraw 的浏览器演示（Gemma 4 E2B，3.1GB）
items.summary_en: Demonstrates a browser-based pipeline that turns natural language prompts into Excalidraw sketches using Gemma 4 E2B models loaded in WASM. With a hefty 3.1GB model, it showcases the feasibility of offline, in-browser creative generation and the practical limits of client-side AI tools.
items.summary_zh: 展示了一个在浏览器中运行的管线，能将自然语言提示转化为 Excalidraw 草图，使用 Gemma 4 E2B 模型以 WASM 形式加载。模型体积达到 3.1GB，体现了离线、浏览器端创作生成的可行性，同时也揭示了客户端 AI 工具在资源和性能上的现实限制。

items.title_en: It's cool to care (2025)
items.title_zh: 关心也很酷（2025）
items.summary_en: Encourages developers to value craftsmanship, user welfare, and long-term thinking over flashy trends. The piece reflects on practical habits for building durable software teams and why empathy in engineering pays off in the long run.
items.summary_zh: 鼓励开发者重视工艺、用户福祉和长期思考，而非追逐浮夸趋势。文章结合实际经验，提出构建耐用软件与团队的可行习惯，以及在工程中注入同理心为何能带来长期回报。

items.title_en: America Lost the Mandate of Heaven
items.title_zh: 美国已失去天命
items.summary_en: The piece argues that American political legitimacy has slipped, with consequences for tech policy, global leadership, and innovation. It frames tech policy as part of a broader erosion of credibility and influence. It calls for renewed clarity in leadership and strategy.
items.summary_zh: 文章认为美国的政治合法性正在下滑，这将影响科技政策、全球领导力与创新能力。将科技政策放在更广泛的信誉与影响力下降的语境中讨论，呼吁在领导力和战略上寻求新的清晰度。

items.title_en: When moving fast, talking is the first thing to break
items.title_zh: 快速推进时，谈话往往最先出错
items.summary_en: A reflective piece arguing that high-velocity work reduces effective communication; suggests prioritizing clear docs, asynchronous updates, and grokking over talking. It offers tips for teams to stay aligned when speed increases.
items.summary_zh: 一篇反思文章指出在高强度、快速推进的工作中，沟通往往会变得薄弱。建议优先完善文档、采用异步更新并注重深度理解，以在高速度下保持团队对齐。

items.title_en: Six Characters
items.title_zh: 六名角色
items.summary_en: Six Characters uses six archetypes to illustrate core ideas in an Iron Core project.
items.summary_zh: 《Six Characters》用六个原型来阐释铁核项目的核心思想。

items.title_en: The FBI Director Is MIA
items.title_zh: FBI 局长失踪
items.summary_en: The Atlantic piece highlights questions about the FBI director's absences and visibility, fueling debate about leadership accountability and public trust. It raises concerns about governance and the optics of executive presence. The discussion intersects with technology policy and surveillance oversight.
items.summary_zh: 文章关注 FBI 局长的缺勤与知名度，引发关于领导力问责和公众信任的讨论。强调治理与高管出席感的外在影响，讨论点也延伸到技术政策与监控监督等议题。

items.title_en: Uncharted island soon to appear on nautical charts
items.title_zh: 尚未在海图上标注的岛屿将很快出现在航海图上
items.summary_en: A previously uncharted island has been confirmed and will soon appear on nautical charts, marking progress in remote-area mapping. This matters for navigation safety, logistics, and scientific operations in the region.
items.summary_zh: 一座先前未被绘制的岛屿已被确认，即将出现在航海图上，标志着对偏远水域的制图工作取得进展。这对航海安全、补给与科学考察的后勤具有重要意义。

items.title_en: Launch HN: Kampala (YC W26) – Reverse-Engineer Apps into APIs
items.title_zh: Kampala（YC W26）— 将应用反向工程为 API
items.summary_en: Kampala enables reverse-engineering existing apps into APIs to unlock automation and integration with LLMs. This approach helps teams quickly compose capabilities from legacy apps, bypassing heavy API design.
items.summary_zh: Kampala 让现有应用反向工程化为 API，以便快速将其功能接入自动化工作流和大语言模型。此思路有助于团队绕过繁琐的 API 设计，直接实现对旧系统的集成。

items.title_en: Missouri town fires half its city council over data center deal
items.title_zh: 密苏里小镇因数据中心交易解雇半数市议会
items.summary_en: A Missouri town ousts half of its city council after approving a data center deal, illustrating governance tensions around large tech incentives and transparency. The incident demonstrates how high-stakes deals can destabilize local leadership and ignite public backlash.
items.summary_zh: 密苏里小镇在批准数据中心交易后解雇了半数市议会，反映了围绕大型科技激励措施和透明度的治理紧张。此事显示高额交易可能动摇地方领导层并引发公众反对。

items.title_en: Stealth signals are bypassing Iran’s internet blackout
items.title_zh: 隐形信号绕过伊朗互联网封锁
items.summary_en: Reports describe covert channels—satellite signals, low-bandwidth comms, or broadcast signals—that bypass government internet blackouts, enabling dissidents to share information. The trend underscores the ongoing cat-and-mouse between censorship tech and circumvention tools.
items.summary_zh: 报道描述隐蔽信道，如卫星信号、低带宽通信或广播信号，能够绕过政府的互联网封锁，帮助异议人士传递信息。这反映了审查技术与规避工具之间的持续博弈。

items.title_en: SDL bans AI-written commits
items.title_zh: SDL 禁止 AI 自动生成的提交
items.summary_en: The SDL project bans commits authored by AI, citing concerns about provenance and reproducibility, pushing contributors to ensure human-generated edits.
items.summary_zh: SDL 项目禁止 AI 自动生成的提交，基于可追溯性与可重复性等顾虑，要求贡献者确保人为编辑。

items.title_en: Where did my taxes go?
items.title_zh: 我的税钱去了哪里？
items.summary_en: Where did my taxes go? tracks government spending and public expenditures, illustrating transparency gaps and public demand for clearer budgets.
items.summary_zh: 追踪税款去向，揭示政府支出透明度的不足与公众对更清晰预算的需求。

items.title_en: Show HN: CodeBurn – Analyze Claude Code token usage by task
items.title_zh: Show HN：CodeBurn — 按任务分析 Claude 代码任务的 token 使用
items.summary_en: CodeBurn analyzes Claude Code's token usage by task, helping developers understand how compute and cost scale with different inputs. It informs model selection and prompt design when integrating Claude for coding tasks.
items.summary_zh: CodeBurn 按任务分析 Claude 在代码任务中的 token 使用，帮助开发者理解不同输入对算力与成本的影响。这些洞察有助于在将 Claude 应用于代码任务时做出更明智的模型选择和提示设计。

items.title_en: Stop trying to engineer your way out of listening to people
items.title_zh: 停止用工程手段回避倾听他人
items.summary_en: The piece argues that listening is the core issue, not process design. It emphasizes feedback loops and user-centric work practices to capture voices, warning that automation can’t replace human listening.
items.summary_zh: 作者认为倾听才是关键问题，而不是简单地改造流程。通过强调反馈循环和更贴近用户的工作方式，文章点出技术解决方案无法替代真实的人类倾听。

items.title_en: OpenAI's $852B valuation faces investor scrutiny amid strategy shift, FT reports
items.title_zh: OpenAI 的 8520 亿美元估值在战略转型中遭投资者审查
items.summary_en: Investors question OpenAI's sky-high valuation as the company pivots toward different business lines and profitability, signaling a renewed focus on economics and governance rather than sheer growth. The shift could affect funding expectations and strategic direction.
items.summary_zh: 随着 OpenAI 在业务路线和盈利能力上作出转变，投资者对其高达 8520 亿美元的估值提出质疑，凸显对经济性与治理的重新关注，可能改变融资预期与战略方向。

items.title_en: Rewriting Every Syscall in a Linux Binary at Load Time
items.title_zh: 在加载时对 Linux 二进制中的所有系统调用进行重写
items.summary_en: Describes loading Linux binaries with runtime syscall rewrites to intercept or instrument behavior without altering source. The approach enables dynamic analysis and sandboxing, but raises questions about performance, reliability, and compatibility.
items.summary_zh: 介绍在加载时对 Linux 二进制进行系统调用重写，以拦截或插桩行为，而无需修改源代码。此方法支持动态分析和沙箱化，但也带来性能、可靠性和兼容性方面的质疑。

items.title_en: N-Day-Bench – Can LLMs find real vulnerabilities in real codebases?
items.title_zh: N-Day-Bench：LLMs 能在真实代码库中发现漏洞吗？
items.summary_en: N-Day-Bench introduces a benchmark to evaluate whether LLMs can discover real vulnerabilities in actual codebases. Results demonstrate potential and current limits of AI-assisted security analysis, guiding prudent deployment in code review tasks.
items.summary_zh: N-Day-Bench 引入一个基准测试，用以评估大型语言模型在真实代码库中发现漏洞的能力。结果展示了 AI 辅助安全分析的潜力与现阶段的局限，为将来在代码审查中的应用提供参考。

items.title_en: MEMS Array Chip Can Project Video the Size of a Grain of Sand
items.title_zh: MEMS阵列芯片能投射出如沙粒大小的视频
items.summary_en: A MEMS-photonics chip demonstrates ultra-compact video projection at grain-of-sand scale, signaling advances in micro-display tech. The breakthrough points to potential applications in wearables, AR/VR, and mini projectors.
items.summary_zh: 新型 MEMS 光子芯片实现了极小尺度的视频投射，尺寸可达到沙粒等级。该突破揭示了微型显示技术的进展及在可穿戴设备、AR/VR 和微型投影设备等领域的潜在应用。

items.title_en: Show HN: Plain – The full-stack Python framework designed for humans and agents
items.title_zh: Show HN: Plain——为人和代理人设计的全栈 Python 框架
items.summary_en: Plain is a full-stack Python framework designed for humans and AI agents building apps. It emphasizes developer ergonomics, offering end-to-end tooling, clear abstractions, and smooth integration with AI workflows to speed up common tasks.
items.summary_zh: Plain 是一个为人和 AI 代理人打造应用的全栈 Python 框架，强调开发者体验。它提供端到端工具、清晰的抽象以及与 AI 工作流的无缝整合，帮助加速常见任务的实现。

items.title_en: Why AI Sucks at Front End
items.title_zh: AI 为什么在前端开发中表现劣势
items.summary_en: AI struggles with frontend tasks due to nuanced UI/UX, accessibility, and component composition that require human judgment. The piece argues AI is best used as an assistant rather than a replacement for frontend engineers.
items.summary_zh: AI 在前端开发中难以处理细粒度的用户体验、无障碍与组件组合等问题，易出错。文章认为应将 AI 作为辅助工具，而非试图替代有经验的前端工程师。

items.title_en: ReBot-DevArm: open-source Robotic Arm
items.title_zh: ReBot-DevArm 开源机器人臂
items.summary_en: ReBot-DevArm is an open-source robotic arm project, likely modular and affordable, built by Seeed Projects. It offers a hands-on platform for learning robotics, prototyping, and hardware-software integration.
items.summary_zh: ReBot-DevArm 是一个开源机器人臂项目，通常具备模块化设计、低成本定位，便于学习机器人学、快速原型设计以及软硬件集成实验。

items.title_en: Apple App Store threatened to remove Grok over deepfakes: Letter
items.title_zh: 苹果 App Store 因深度伪造内容威胁下架 Grok：公开信
items.summary_en: Apple reportedly threatened to pull Grok from the App Store amid concerns about deepfake capabilities and misuse, triggering a debate about platform risk vs. user autonomy and AI-generated media governance. The incident highlights policy risk for AI-enabled apps and the limits of platform discretion.
items.summary_zh: 报道称苹果因担忧深度伪造和滥用风险，威胁下架 Grok 应用，激发关于平台风险、用户自主权以及 AI 生成媒体治理的讨论。此事凸显在主流应用市场上对 AI 驱动应用的治理难题和平台裁量的边界。

items.title_en: Initial mainline video capture and camera support for Rockchip RK3588
items.title_zh: Rockchip RK3588 首次实现主线视频捕获与摄像头支持
items.summary_en: Collabora reports initial mainline Linux kernel support for video capture and cameras on the RK3588, enabling better Linux on RK3588-based devices. This milestone helps developers ship hardware with upstream drivers and smoother support for cameras and video pipelines.
items.summary_zh: Collabora 公告 RK3588 已实现主线 Linux 内核的视频捕获与摄像头支持的初步阶段，提升基于 RK3588 的设备在 Linux 下的兼容性。该里程碑为开发者提供更直接的上游驱动和更顺畅的视频/摄像头管线支持。

items.title_en: A soft robot has no problem moving with no motor and no gears
items.title_zh: 软体机器人在没有马达和齿轮的情况下也能移动
items.summary_en: Soft robots move without traditional motors or gears by exploiting flexible materials, fluids, or smart actuators. This approach offers simpler, safer motion with potential for delicate manipulation and soft grippers in real-world tasks.
items.summary_zh: 软体机器人通过柔性材料、流体驱动或智能执行元件实现无传统马达和齿轮的移动。这样的设计带来更简单、对环境更友好的运动，适用于柔性抓取和安全敏感的应用场景。

items.title_en: US national level OS-level age verification bill
items.title_zh: 美国全国层面的操作系统级别年龄验证法案
items.summary_en: A proposed US bill would enforce age verification at the OS level, raising privacy and entitlement concerns. Advocates cite safety and compliance, while critics worry about encryption, accessibility, and overreach. The policy debate highlights tensions between security, user rights, and platform governance.
items.summary_zh: 一项拟议中的美国法案将强制在操作系统层面进行年龄验证，引发隐私与权限争议。支持者称这是出于安全与合规的考虑，批评者担心对加密、无障碍性与过度监管的影响。这场政策辩论凸显了安全、用户权利与平台治理之间的紧张关系。

items.title_en: SI Units for Request Rate (2024)
items.title_zh: 请求速率的 SI 单位（2024）
items.summary_en: Argues for expressing web request rates with SI units (per second, s^-1) rather than rate-numbers common in software like RPS. The piece explains why proper units improve clarity in performance metrics and monitoring dashboards.
items.summary_zh: 主张用 SI 单位来表示请求速率（以每秒计，s^-1），而不是常见的 RPS 等表达。文章解释了统一单位能提高性能衡量和监控仪表盘的清晰度与互操作性。

items.title_en: Visualizing CPU Pipelining (2024)
items.title_zh: 可视化 CPU 流水线（2024）
items.summary_en: This post visualizes CPU pipeline stages and hazards, helping readers grasp how instruction-level parallelism and stalls affect performance. It provides diagrams and explanations that are accessible to both students and professionals.
items.summary_zh: 本文可视化 CPU 流水线的各阶段与冒险，帮助读者理解指令级并行性与停顿如何影响性能。配以图示与解释，适合学生与专业人士阅读。

items.title_en: State of Homelab 2026
items.title_zh: 2026 年家庭实验室现状
items.summary_en: A survey of home labs in 2026 highlights evolving hobbyist setups, with popular virtualization stacks, compact hardware, and a push toward automation and energy efficiency. It offers practical guidance for enthusiasts building compact, affordable labs.
items.summary_zh: 对2026年家庭实验室的现状进行调查，揭示了流行的虚拟化架构、紧凑型硬件，以及对自动化与节能的重视。为希望以有限空间和预算搭建个人实验室的爱好者提供实用建议。

items.title_en: My AI-Assisted Workflow
items.title_zh: 我的 AI 辅助工作流
items.summary_en: A personal account of an AI-assisted workflow, detailing tools, patterns, and productivity gains, with caveats about over-dependence on prompts.
items.summary_zh: 分享个人的 AI 辅助工作流经验，介绍工具、工作流设计和生产力提升，同时警惕对提示词过度依赖等风险。

items.title_en: CPUs Aren't Dead. Gemma2B Out Scored GPT-3.5 Turbo on Test That Made It Famous
items.title_zh: CPU 并未死，Gemma2B 在著名测试中击败 GPT-3.5 Turbo
items.summary_en: Gemma2B reportedly outscored GPT-3.5 Turbo on a benchmark that made the latter famous, reminding us that CPUs and optimized systems still matter for certain AI tasks.
items.summary_zh: 据称 Gemma2B 在一项让 GPT-3.5 Turbo 成名的基准测试中获胜，提醒我们在某些 AI 场景下，CPU 和优化系统仍然重要。

items.title_en: How Wake-On-LAN works (2020)
items.title_zh: Wake-On-LAN 工作原理（2020）
items.summary_en: Explains how Wake-on-LAN works, including magic packets, how to wake devices through routers and firewalls, and practical setup tips. The piece also covers security considerations, such as exposure to the internet and potential misuse, with actionable guidance for home and small-office networks.
items.summary_zh: 說明 Wake-on-LAN 的工作機制，包括魔術封包、透過路由器與防火牆喚醒裝置，以及實務設定建議。文中也討論將喚醒功能暴露於網際網路的安全風險，並提供家庭與小型辦公網路的實務設定指引。

items.title_en: Trusted access for the next era of cyber defense
items.title_zh: 面向下一代网络防御的可信访问
